V009-N01458.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01458.label: 暴盲
V009-N01458.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N01458.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01458.label: 暴盲
V009-N01458.englishNames: sudden blindness; sudden vissal loss; Sudden blindness; Sudden Vissal Loss
V009-N01458.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01458.definition: Characterized by sudden visual impairment or vision loss of one or both eyes. Often results from blockage of eye tissues, blood heat (due to yang hyperactivity) damaging eye collaterals, or retinal detachment.

V009-N01458.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01458.label: 暴盲
V009-N01458.englishNames: sudden blindness; Sudden Vissal Loss; sudden vissal loss

V009-N01458.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01458.label: 暴盲
V009-N01458.englishNames: sudden blindness; Sudden Vissal Loss; sudden vissal loss
V009-N01458.definition: a severe eye disease characterized by sudden loss of vision while no abnormal appearance of the eye can be found

V009-N01470.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.definition: 因肝肾亏衰,精血不足，目窍萎闭，或脾肾阳虚，目失温养，或肝气不舒，玄府郁闭，或头眼部外伤，或瞳神久病，肿瘤压迫,脉络瘀阻所致。临床以眼外观端好，而视力渐降,终致失明等为特征的内障眼病。

V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01470.definition: 以眼外观端好，而视力渐降至失明为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01470.definition: 以眼外观端好，而视力渐降至失明为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01470.definition: 多由视瞻昏渺、高风内障等瞳神疾病日久失治演变而成。以眼外观端好，而眼神呆迟，视力逐渐下降，终致失明为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.englishNames: blue blindness; optic atrophy; Blue Blindness; bluish blindness; bluish blindness (optic atrophy)
V009-N01470.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病

V009-N01470.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V009-N01470.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.englishNames: blue blindness; optic atrophy; Blue Blindness; bluish blindness; Bluish blindness; bluish blindness (optic atrophy)
V009-N01470.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01470.definition: A condition characterized by gradually progressive visual impairment to complete vision loss. Often results from deficiency of liver blood and kidney essence, yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, eye injuries or eye tumour.

V009-N01470.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.aliases: BYT090； Optic Atrophic Blindness； Optic Atrophy
V009-N01470.englishNames: bluish blindness; Blue Blindness; bluish blindness (optic atrophy); blue blindness; optic atrophy

V009-N01470.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01470.label: 青盲
V009-N01470.aliases: BYT090； Optic Atrophic Blindness； Optic Atrophy
V009-N01470.englishNames: bluish blindness; Blue Blindness; bluish blindness (optic atrophy); blue blindness; optic atrophy
V009-N01470.definition: a group of eye diseases characterized by increasing impairment of vision to total blindness with no abnormal appearance of the external eye, referring to optic nerve atrophy

V009-N01459.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01459.label: 血灌瞳神
V009-N01459.definition: 因肝胆热盛，或阴虚火旺,迫血妄行，或目珠外伤，血络受损，溢于络外，灌入瞳神所致。临床以血液积于瞳神前后，视力骤降，伴眼前暗影飘荡等为特征的内障眼病。

V009-N01459.label: 血灌瞳神
V009-N01459.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01459.definition: 因目内之血不循经，溢于瞳神内外，导致以视力骤降，眼前阴影飘荡，窥不进眼底为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01459.label: 血灌瞳神
V009-N01459.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01459.definition: 血不循经，溢于瞳神内外，以视力骤降，眼前阴影飘荡为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01459.label: 血灌瞳神
V009-N01459.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病

V009-N01459.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01459.label: 血灌瞳神
V009-N01459.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V009-N01457.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01457.label: 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.definition: 因湿浊上泛，或阴虚火旺，或肝郁血结，神膏为邪所乘，或肝肾不足，目失所养所致。临床以眼外观端好，自觉眼前似有蚊蝇或云雾样黑影飞舞飘移，甚至视物昏蒙等为特征的内障眼病。

V009-N01457.label: 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01457.definition: 以眼外观端好，自觉眼前似有蚊蝇或云雾样黑影飞舞飘移，甚至影响视力为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01457.label: 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.englishNames: fog moving before eye; vitreous opacity
V009-N01457.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01457.definition: 以眼外观端好，自觉眼前似有蚊蝇或云雾样黑影飞舞飘移，严重时影响视力为主要表现的眼病。相当于玻璃体混浊。

V009-N01457.label: 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.aliases: 玻璃体混浊； 飞蚊症； 眼风黑花； 蝇翅黑花
V009-N01457.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01457.definition: 因神膏为邪所乘，浑浊不清所致。以眼外观端好，自觉眼前似有蚊蝇云雾样黑影飞舞飘移，甚至视物昏蒙为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01457.label: 视衣脱离
V009-N01457.aliases: 神光自现； 视网膜脱离； 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.englishNames: Detachment Of Retina; Retinal Detachment; Sublatio Retinae
V009-N01457.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01457.definition: 是视网膜内九层与其色素上皮层之间的分离而引起视功能障碍的眼病。本病病因病机为：禀赋不足或劳瞻竭视，精血暗耗，肝肾两虚，神膏变性，目失所养；脾胃气虚，运化失司，固摄无权，水湿停滞，上泛目窍；头眼部外伤，视衣受损。

V009-N01457.label: 眼前黑影
V009-N01457.aliases: 细小星翳； 眼前暗影； 眼前有黑影遮挡； 眼前有似云雾飘动； 眼前有小片暗影遮挡； 眼前云雾； 眼前云影； 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状

V009-N01457.label: 云雾移睛
V009-N01457.englishNames: fog moving before eye; vitreous opacity; fog moving into eye; hyalosis; fog moving before eye (vitreous opacity)
V009-N01457.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病

V009-N01457.aliases: BYT060； 玻璃体混浊； 飞蚊症； 眼风黑花； 蝇翅黑花

V009-N01457.definition: presence of cloudy or star-shaped opacities in the vitreous humor

V009-N01460.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺
V009-N01460.definition: 因脾失健运，浊气上泛，或肝肾亏虚，精血不足，目失濡养所致。临床以视力逐渐减退，视物模糊不清，外眼无异等为特征的内障眼病。

V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺
V009-N01460.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01460.definition: 以眼外观无异常，而视力逐渐减退，至视物模糊不清为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺
V009-N01460.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01460.definition: 以眼外观无异常，而视力逐渐减退，至视物模糊不清为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺
V009-N01460.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01460.definition: 视瞻昏渺是指眼外观无异常，视物昏朦，随年龄增长而视力减退日渐加重，且终致失明的眼病。结合临床归纳其病因病机为：饮食不节，脾失健运，不能运化水湿，聚湿成痰，浊气上泛，或脾气虚弱，气虚血瘀，视物昏朦；老年人肝肾亏虚，精血不足，目失濡养或阴虚火炎，灼烁津液以致神光暗淡；老思竭视，耗伤心血或素体气血不足，以致目昏不明。

V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺
V009-N01460.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状｜视觉异常

V009-N01460.label: 视瞻昏渺

V009-N01442.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01442.label: 瞳神干缺
V009-N01442.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病
V009-N01442.definition: 因肝肾不足，虚火上炎，或邪热上犯,灼伤黄仁所致。临床以瞳神缩小，干缺不圆，如锯齿、似梅花，且黄仁干枯不荣等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01442.label: 瞳神干缺
V009-N01442.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01442.definition: 以黄仁与晶珠黏着，致瞳神边缘参差不齐，呈锯齿状或花瓣状,部分或全部失去展缩功能,黄仁色泽干枯不荣为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01442.label: 瞳神干缺
V009-N01442.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01442.definition: 以黄仁与晶状体黏着，致瞳神边缘参差不齐，呈锯齿状或花瓣状，部分或全部失去展缩功能，黄仁色泽干枯不荣为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01442.label: 瞳神干缺
V009-N01442.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01442.definition: 病证名。系指瞳神缩小、金井不圆、上下东西如锯齿或如梅花。甚或瞳神被膜障内遮、视力锐减的病证。见《世医得效方》卷十六。又名瞳神缺陷、瞳神干缺。本病多由肝肾阴亏、虚火上炎所致。治宜滋阴降火。方用补肾明目丸加减。

V009-N01442.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01442.label: 瞳神干缺
V009-N01442.englishNames: pupillary metamorphosis; Roughly Peripheral Pupil; dry defective pupil; papil lary metamorphosis
V009-N01442.definition: loss of the normal round shape of the pupil, usually seen in chronic iridocyclitis

V009-N01443.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病
V009-N01443.definition: 因情志失调,气郁血瘀,肝胆火炽,神水积滞等所致。临床以眼压升高，头目胀痛，视力昏蒙,抱轮红赤，瞳神散大等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01443.definition: 青风内障、绿风内障、黄风内障、黑风内障、乌风内障的总称。

V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病
V009-N01443.definition: 为青风内障，绿风内障，黄风内障，乌风内障，黑风内障之合称。因情志抑郁，气机郁结，肝胆火炽，深水积滞所致。以头目胀痛，抱轮红赤，视力昏蒙为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder
V009-N01443.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病

V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder
V009-N01443.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜眼、耳、鼻和喉系统病类

V009-N01443.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01443.label: 五风内障
V009-N01443.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder; Glaucoma
V009-N01443.pinyinNames: wu feng nei zhang; wǔ fēng nèi zhàng
V009-N01443.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01443.definition: Characterized by increased pressure in the eye, headache, eye distension/pain, blurred vision, red eyes and dilation of the pupil. Often results from emotional stress, qi stagnation and blood stasis, and exuberant fire in the liver and gallbladder.

V009-N01445.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障
V009-N01445.definition: 因情志不舒,肝郁化火，肝风上扰，或脾湿生痰,痰火升扰，或阴虚阳亢,气血不和,神水瘀滞所致。临床以眼珠变硬,瞳神散大、瞳色淡绿，视力骤降，伴有头痛如劈，目赤胀痛,恶心、呕吐等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.englishNames: green wind glaucoma; acute angleclosure glaucoma
V009-N01445.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01445.definition: 以眼珠胀硬，瞳神散大，瞳色淡绿，抱轮深红，头眼剧痛，视力剧降为主要表现的急性眼病。

V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01445.definition: 以眼珠胀硬，瞳神散大，瞳色淡绿，抱轮赤红，头眼剧痛，视力骤降为主要表现的急性眼病。甚者转变成黄风内障。相当于急性闭角型青光眼。

V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.aliases: 急性闭角型青光眼； 绿风； 绿盲； 绿水灌珠
V009-N01445.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病｜五风内障
V009-N01445.definition: 多因情志不舒，肝郁化火，肝风上扰，或阴虚阳亢，气血不和，神水瘀滞所致。以瞳神散大，呈淡绿色，视力骤降，头痛如裂，目赤胀痛，恶心呕吐为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.aliases: Acute Angleclosure Glaucoma； Green Pupil Inter Oculopathy； Green Pupil Internal Oculopathy
V009-N01445.englishNames: green glaucoma(acute angle-closure glaucoma); Green Wind Glaucoma; greenish wind glaucoma; greenish glaucoma; green wind glaucoma; acute angle-closure glaucoma; acute angleclosure glaucoma
V009-N01445.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障

V009-N01445.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类｜青光眼

V009-N01445.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.aliases: Acute Angleclosure Glaucoma； Green Pupil Inter Oculopathy； Green Pupil Internal Oculopathy
V009-N01445.englishNames: green wind glaucoma; acute angle-closure glaucoma; green glaucoma(acute angle-closure glaucoma); Green Wind Glaucoma; greenish wind glaucoma; greenish glaucoma; Greenish glaucoma; acute angleclosure glaucoma
V009-N01445.pinyinNames: lv feng nei zhang; lǜ fēng nèi zhàng
V009-N01445.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01445.definition: Characterized by hardening of the eyeball, dilation of the pupil with greenish colour, and drastic impairment of vision. Splitting headache, eye distension and pain, nausea and vomiting may also be present. Often results from liver qi stagnation transforming into fire, ascending of phlegm fire due to spleen deficiency, or disharmony between qi and blood due to yin deficiency and yang hyperactivity.

V009-N01445.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.aliases: BYT020； Acute Angleclosure Glaucoma； Green Pupil Inter Oculopathy； Green Pupil Internal Oculopathy
V009-N01445.englishNames: greenish glaucoma; Green Wind Glaucoma; green glaucoma(acute angle-closure glaucoma); green wind glaucoma; acute angleclosure glaucoma

V009-N01445.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01445.label: 绿风内障
V009-N01445.aliases: BYT020； Acute Angleclosure Glaucoma； Green Pupil Inter Oculopathy； Green Pupil Internal Oculopathy
V009-N01445.englishNames: greenish glaucoma; Green Wind Glaucoma; green glaucoma(acute angle-closure glaucoma); green wind glaucoma; acute angleclosure glaucoma
V009-N01445.definition: an acute eye disease characterized by hardening of the eyeball, drastic impairment of vision, dilation of the pupil with greenish discoloration，and severe headache and eye pain

V009-N01444.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障
V009-N01444.definition: 因肝郁气滞，或阴虚阳亢，痰火升扰，脾虚湿泛，神水滞积，久则气阴耗伤所致。临床以瞳神轻度散大，瞳色淡青，眼压偏高，视野日渐缩窄，终致失明等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01444.definition: 以起病无明显不适，眼珠逐渐胀硬，瞳色微混如青山笼淡烟之状，视野日渐缩窄，视力渐减,终至失明为主要表现的慢性眼病。

V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01444.definition: 以起病无明显不适，瞳色微混如青山笼淡烟之状，视野日渐缩窄，终至失明为主要表现的眼病。绿风内障的早期。

V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.aliases: 青风； 青风障症； 原发性开角型青光眼
V009-N01444.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜瞳神疾病｜五风内障
V009-N01444.definition: 因肝郁气滞，或阴虚阳亢所致。以瞳神呈淡青色、略微散大或不大，头痛眼胀，视力逐渐昏蒙，视界渐小为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.englishNames: bluish wind glaucoma(angle-opening glaucoma); blue wind glaucoma; blu ish glaucoma; bluish wind glaucoma
V009-N01444.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障

V009-N01444.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类｜青光眼

V009-N01444.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.englishNames: bluish wind glaucoma(angle-opening glaucoma); blue wind glaucoma; blu ish glaucoma; bluish wind glaucoma; Bluish glaucoma
V009-N01444.pinyinNames: qing feng nei zhang; qīng fēng nèi zhàng
V009-N01444.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01444.definition: Characterized by mild dilation of the pupil with a bluish colour, increased pressure in the eye, gradual visual field constriction and, eventually vision loss. Often results from liver qi stagnation, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency or ascending of phlegm fire.

V009-N01444.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01444.label: 青风内障
V009-N01444.aliases: BYT030； 青风； 青风障症； 原发性开角型青光眼
V009-N01444.englishNames: Bluish Cataract; bluish wind glaucoma(angle-opening glaucoma); blue wind glaucoma; blu ish glaucoma

V009-N01446.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01446.label: 黄风内障
V009-N01446.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障
V009-N01446.definition: 因肝风痰火上扰,耗损瞳神，目系瘀阻,或由绿风、青风、黑风内障等失治所致。临床以瞳神散大，晶珠浑浊呈淡黄色，目盲失明等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01446.label: 黄风内障
V009-N01446.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01446.definition: 由绿风内障失治而成，以瞳神散大、晶状体混浊呈淡黄色、目盲为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01446.label: 黄风内障
V009-N01446.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障

V009-N01446.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01446.label: 黄风内障
V009-N01446.pinyinNames: huang feng nei zhang; huáng fēng nèi zhàng
V009-N01446.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01446.definition: Characterized by dilation of the pupil with a pale, yellowish colour, and vision loss. Often results from ascending of liver fire that carries phlegm. It may also occur as a result of untreated greenish glaucoma, bluish glaucoma or black glaucoma.

V009-N01447.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01447.label: 乌风内障
V009-N01447.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障
V009-N01447.definition: 因阴虚火旺，内挟风痰，神水瘀滞所致。临床以眼珠胀痛，视物模糊，瞳神气色昏暗，日久变乌，头痛，眼前常有黑花，视力下降，终至不见三光等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01447.label: 乌风内障
V009-N01447.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01447.definition: 以眼珠胀痛，视物模糊，瞳神气色昏暗，日久变乌为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01447.label: 乌风内障
V009-N01447.englishNames: dark wind glaucoma; black wind glaucoma
V009-N01447.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障

V009-N01447.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01447.label: 乌风内障
V009-N01447.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类｜青光眼

V009-N01447.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01447.label: 乌风内障
V009-N01447.englishNames: dark wind glaucoma; black wind glaucoma; Dark glaucoma
V009-N01447.pinyinNames: wu feng nei zhang; wū fēng nèi zhàng
V009-N01447.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01447.definition: Characterized by distension and pain of the eyeball, blurred vision, appearance of opaque specks in the lens, occasional headache, and gradually progressive vision loss. Often results from ascending of hyperactive deficiency fire that carries phlegm.

V009-N01448.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01448.label: 黑风内障
V009-N01448.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障
V009-N01448.definition: 因肝风痰火或肾虚风热，气血失和，神水瘀滞所致。临床以头眼胀痛，眼前时见黑花，瞳神散大且气色昏黑，视力下降等为特征的瞳神病。

V009-N01448.label: 黑风内障
V009-N01448.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01448.definition: 以头眼胀痛，眼前时起黑花，视力下降，眼珠胀硬，瞳神散大且气色昏黑为主要表现的眼病。与绿风内障症状相同，体征不同。

V009-N01448.label: 黑风内障
V009-N01448.englishNames: dark wind glaucoma; black wind glaucoma
V009-N01448.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病｜五风内障

V009-N01448.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01448.label: 黑风内障
V009-N01448.englishNames: Black glaucoma; dark wind glaucoma; black wind glaucoma
V009-N01448.pinyinNames: hēi fēng nèi zhàng; hei feng nei zhang
V009-N01448.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01448.definition: Characterized by headache, eye distension and pain, blurred vision, dilated pupil with a black colour, and visual impairment. Often results from liver wind that carries phlegm or disharmony between qi and blood due to kidney deficiency.

V009-N01493.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.definition: 因年老气衰,精血不足，目光不能聚敛视近所致。临床以40岁以上，视远如常，视近则模糊不清，随年龄增长而逐渐加重,或伴眼胀、干涩等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01493.definition: 凡人年过四十五岁,出现以视远物仍清晰，视近物模糊为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01493.definition: 以年过45岁，视远物较清晰，视近物模糊为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.aliases: 花眼； 老花； 老花眼； 眼花
V009-N01493.englishNames: Old Sight; Presbyopia; Presbytism; Visus Senilis
V009-N01493.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜其他眼病
V009-N01493.definition: 因年老精气不充，神光失调所致。以视远物仍清晰，视近物渐模糊为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状
V009-N01493.definition: 是指随着年龄增加而导致的生理性调节力减退而发生近视力减退的现象。

V009-N01493.label: 老视
V009-N01493.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01472.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01472.label: 通睛
V009-N01472.definition: 因先天不足，或脾虚筋肉失养，或高热伤津所致。临床以双眼向内偏斜，而眼珠转动如常等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01472.label: 通睛
V009-N01472.aliases: 共同性内斜视； 睊目； 双目通睛； 天旋； 小儿通睛外障
V009-N01472.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜眼外肌疾病
V009-N01472.definition: 是指双眼同时注视时，目珠偏于内眦的眼病。

V009-N01472.label: 通睛
V009-N01472.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01491.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01491.label: 近视
V009-N01491.definition: 因青少年过用目力，竭视劳倦，导致神光不足，或先天不足，神光衰微，目光不能及远所致。临床以视近清晰，视远模糊等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01491.label: 近视
V009-N01491.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01491.definition: 以视近物清楚，视远物模糊为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01491.label: 近视
V009-N01491.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01491.definition: 以视近物清楚，视远物模糊为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01491.label: 近视
V009-N01491.aliases: 近觑； 目不能远视； 能近怯远症
V009-N01491.englishNames: Brachymetropia; Short-sightedness; Short-sightnear-sightedness Mypia; Visus Brevior; Visus Juvenum
V009-N01491.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜其他眼病
V009-N01491.definition: 因青少年时竭视劳倦，导致神光不足，或禀赋不足所致。以视近物清晰，视远物模糊为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01481.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01481.label: 辘轳转关
V009-N01481.definition: 因先天不足，或风邪扰动，致筋脉振惕所致。临床以双眼目珠不自主地向左右或上下不停地有节奏的往返颤动或旋转，伴见视力低下等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01481.label: 辘轳转关
V009-N01481.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜黑睛疾病
V009-N01481.definition: 因先天禀赋不足，或风邪扰动，致筋脉振惕所致。以两眼不自主地颤动为主要表现的外障类疾病。

V009-N01481.label: 辘轳转关
V009-N01481.pinyinNames: gu lu zhuan guan; lu lu zhuan guan
V009-N01481.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01492.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01492.label: 远视
V009-N01492.definition: 因肾阴亏损，目光不能聚敛视近，或先天不足，肝肾俱虚，目光散漫不收所致。临床以视远清楚，视近模糊等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01492.label: 远视
V009-N01492.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01492.definition: 以视远物清楚，视近物模糊为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01492.label: 远视
V009-N01492.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01492.definition: 以视远物较视近物清楚为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01492.label: 远视
V009-N01492.englishNames: Far Sight; Farsightedness; Hyperopia; Hyperpresbyopia; Longsightedness
V009-N01492.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜其他眼病
V009-N01492.definition: 因禀赋不足，阴精亏损，不能收敛光华。以视远物清楚，视近物模糊为主要表现的内障类疾病。

V009-N01492.label: 远视
V009-N01492.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01478.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01478.label: 鹘眼凝睛
V009-N01478.aliases: 鸪眼凝睛； 鱼睛不夜
V009-N01478.definition: 因肝郁痰湿，或肝肾阴虚，虚火上炎，脉络涩滞，气血瘀阻所致。临床以眼珠突出，白睛红赤如鶻鸟之眼，凝视难以转动等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01478.label: 鹘眼凝睛
V009-N01478.aliases: Graves眼病； 鹘眼凝睛外障； 鱼睛不夜
V009-N01478.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜眼眶疾病
V009-N01478.definition: 是指以眼珠突出，如鹘鸟之眼，呈凝视状为特征的眼病。

V009-N01478.label: 鹘眼凝睛
V009-N01478.aliases: 鸪眼凝睛； 鱼睛不夜
V009-N01478.englishNames: falcon fixed eye; exophthalmos; staring falcon eye; fixed protrusion of the eyes
V009-N01478.pinyinNames: hu yan ning jing; gu yan ning jing
V009-N01478.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01478.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01478.label: 鹘眼凝睛
V009-N01478.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V009-N01476.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.definition: 因风热痰湿，上扰目窍，或肝郁气滞，或肝血不足，目失濡养所致。临床以眉棱骨疼痛，或痛连眶内，或痛连两颞，时轻时重，伴见眼珠胀痛、不耐久视等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01476.definition: 以攒竹穴处为主的眉棱骨部痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.englishNames: pain in supraorbital bone; supraorbital neuralgia
V009-N01476.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01476.definition: 以攒竹穴处为主的眉棱骨部疼痛为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.aliases: 眶上神经痛； 眉框痛； 眼眶骨痛； 攒竹痛
V009-N01476.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜眼眶疾病
V009-N01476.definition: 眉棱骨痛是指眉棱骨部或眼眶骨疼痛的眼病。结合临床归纳其病因病机：风热之邪外袭，循太阳经脉上扰目窍所致；风痰上犯，阻滞目窍脉道，清阳不能升运于目而发；肝血不足，目窍脉络空虚，头目无所滋养而引发；肝郁气滞，郁久化火，形成肝火，上炎目窍而导致。

V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.englishNames: supraorbital neuralgia; pain of supraorbital bone; pain in supraorbital bone
V009-N01476.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01476.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01476.label: 眉棱骨痛
V009-N01476.definition: pain felt in the eyebrow bone

V009-N01495.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01495.label: 目倦
V009-N01495.definition: 因久视劳心伤神，耗气伤血，或肝肾精血亏损，目失所养，调节失司所致。临床以视物不能持久，久则视物模糊、眼胀、头痛，休息后可缓解或消失等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01495.label: 视疲劳
V009-N01495.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01495.definition: 以久视后出现眼胀、头痛、头晕、眼眶胀痛等自觉症状为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01495.label: 视疲劳
V009-N01495.englishNames: Blepsopathy; Copiopsia; Eyestrain; Eye Strain; Kopiopsia; Ophthalmocopia; Ophthalmokopia; Visus debilitas
V009-N01495.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜其他眼病
V009-N01495.definition: 视疲劳又称目倦，是指过用目力而出现视物不能持久，久则视物昏花、头痛、眼胀为主要表现的眼病。常有久视后出现眼胀、头痛、头晕、眼眶胀痛等自觉症状及眼或全身器质性因素与精神（心理）因素相互交织的综合征。结合临床归纳其病因病机如下：久视劳心伤神，耗气损血，目中经络涩滞所致；肝肾精血亏损不足，筋失所养，调节失司；劳瞻竭视，暗耗精气阴液而生虚火，上炎于目。

V009-N01495.label: 目倦
V009-N01495.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01474.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01474.label: 目偏视
V009-N01474.definition: 因风中经络，或痰湿阻络，或阴虚阳亢，或气虚血瘀，脉络瘀阻，筋肉失养所致。临床以双眼注视目标时,突然出现一眼眼位偏斜，转动受限,视一为二，或伴见眼睑闭合障碍，流泪，头晕，恶心、呕吐，步态不稳等为特征的眼病。

V009-N01474.label: 目偏视
V009-N01474.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01474.definition: 以双眼注视目标时，呈现一眼部位左右或上下偏斜为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01474.label: 目偏视
V009-N01474.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01474.definition: 以双眼注视前方时，眼珠偏离正位，或内或外，或上或下为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01474.label: 风牵偏视
V009-N01474.aliases: 麻痹性斜视； 目偏视； 坠睛； 坠睛眼
V009-N01474.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜眼外肌疾病
V009-N01474.definition: 是以眼珠突然偏斜，转动受限，视一为二为临床特征的眼病。

V009-N01474.label: 目偏视
V009-N01474.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状｜目视所见
V009-N01474.definition: 目偏视属于眼科视诊所见症状，是指双眼平视前方，一眼或双眼偏斜一侧，甚者黑睛为该侧眼眶半掩，或全部掩没，外观只是白睛而言。

V009-N01474.label: 目偏视
V009-N01474.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01464.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01464.label: 视物异色
V009-N01464.definition: 因先天不足，或视瞻昏渺等眼病，致使眼内脉络阻滞，玄府不畅所致。临床以双眼不能正常辨认部分或全部颜色为特征的眼病。

V009-N01464.label: 视物易色
V009-N01464.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01464.definition: 以两眼不能正常辨认物体颜色为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01464.label: 视觉异常
V009-N01464.aliases: 视力异常； 视力障碍； 视物若有振动之感； 视物易色
V009-N01464.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜眼目症状

V009-N01464.label: 视物异色
V009-N01464.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01469.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01469.label: 雀目
V009-N01469.definition: 因脾失健运，气血生化不足，肝血亏虚，不能升运于目所致。临床以入夜或暗处视物不清，或伴有目涩、羞明为特征，常见于疳积上目早期的眼病。

V009-N01469.label: 肝虚雀目
V009-N01469.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01469.definition: 以入暮则视物不清，天晓复明，而无视野缩小的表现，伴眼干涩羞明，频频眨动为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01469.label: 雀目
V009-N01469.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01469.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01469.label: 雀目
V009-N01469.aliases: 肝虚雀目； Night blindness disorder； Night blindness due to liver deficiency； 雀盲
V009-N01469.englishNames: sparrow vision (night blindness); Night blindness; night blindness
V009-N01469.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01469.definition: Characterized by difficult or impossible vision/sight in relatively low light. Individuals may experience sensitivity to light. Often results from insufficient generation of qi and blood (due to spleen deficiency) or liver blood failing to nourish the eyes. It also occurs at the early stage of keratomalacia.

V009-N01498.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01498.label: 疳积上目
V009-N01498.definition: 因小儿疳积，脾胃虚弱，精血不足,或肝虚血少,肝热内生，目窍失养所致。临床以两目干涩、频频眨目，伴有夜盲，日久黑睛生翳，甚至溃破穿孔为特征的眼病。

V009-N01498.label: 疳积上目
V009-N01498.englishNames: malnutrition of eye;keratomalacia due to vitamin A deficiency
V009-N01498.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01498.definition: 由小儿疳积引起，以早期出现夜盲，继而眼珠表面干燥，失去光泽，黑晴呈灰白色胶冻样混浊，甚至糜烂破损，并伴黄液上冲为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01498.label: 疳积上目
V009-N01498.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01498.definition: 小儿疮积引发，以早期出现夜盲，继而眼珠表面干燥，失去光泽，黑晴呈灰白色胶冻样混浊，甚至糜烂破损，并伴黄液上冲为主要表现的眼病。

V009-N01498.label: 疳积上目
V009-N01498.aliases: 疳毒眼； 疳眼； 角膜软化症； 小儿疳伤； 小儿疳眼外障
V009-N01498.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜黑睛疾病
V009-N01498.definition: 是指继发于小儿疳积，初起眼干涩、夜盲，日久黑睛生翳糜烂，甚则溃破穿孔的眼病。结合临床归纳其病因病机：小儿喂养不当，或病中无原则忌口，或偏嗜食物，致脾胃虚弱，气血生化不足，肝虚血少，目失濡养；虫积成疳，脾胃虚弱，脾病及肝，肝虚血少，肝热内生，上攻于目；久患疳积，脾阳不振，寒凝气滞，阳虚阴盛，水湿不化，水寒之气上凌于目。

V009-N01498.label: 疳积上目
V009-N01498.englishNames: malnutrition involving eye(keratomalacia); malnutrition of eye; keratomalacia due to vitamin A deficiency; infantile malnutrition involving eye; keratomalacia; infantile malnutrition affecting the eyes
V009-N01498.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01498.englishNames: Infantile Cornea Softening; Infantile Keratomalacia; malnutrition involving eye(keratomalacia); malnutrition of eye; keratomalacia due to vitamin A deficiency

V009-N01477.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.definition: 因风火邪毒，脏腑积热，上攻于目所致。临床以发病急骤,患眼突起，红赤肿痛，转动受限,视力下降等为特征的急性眼病。

V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.englishNames: acute inflammation of orbit with protrusion of eyeball
V009-N01477.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V009-N01477.definition: 以眼珠胀痛，高高突起为主要表现的急性眼病。

V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V009-N01477.definition: 以眼珠胀痛，转动失灵，白睛赤壅，目痛难忍，眼珠高高突起为主要表现的急性眼病。

V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.aliases: 目珠子突出； 突起睛高外障
V009-N01477.englishNames: acute inflammation of orbit with protrusion of eyeball
V009-N01477.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医眼疾病｜眼眶疾病
V009-N01477.definition: 因风热火毒攻目所致，以发病急，单侧患眼突起、疼痛，白睛红赤、肿胀为主要表现的急性外障类疾病。

V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.englishNames: sudden protrusion of eyeball; acute inflammation of orbit with protrusion of eyeball; sudden protrusion of the eyeball; sudden eyeball protrusion
V009-N01477.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜眼科杂病

V009-N01477.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V009-N01477.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.aliases: BYV060； 目珠子突出； 突起睛高外障
V009-N01477.englishNames: sudden protrusion of the eyeball; acute inflammation of orbit with protrusion of eyeball; sudden protrusion of eyeball

V009-N01477.label: 突起睛高
V009-N01477.aliases: BYV060； 目珠子突出； 突起睛高外障
V009-N01477.englishNames: sudden protrusion of the eyeball; acute inflammation of orbit with protrusion of eyeball; sudden protrusion of eyeball
V009-N01477.definition: an acute eye disease characterized by painful protrusion and distension of the eyeball, often referring to purulent ophthalmia

V009-N01228.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.definition: 因情志不舒,气机逆乱,心脾气血暗耗,郁火不得发越,或天癸将绝，阴阳失调,扰动心神所致。临床以妇女情志异常，精神恍惚，烦躁不宁，无故悲伤，哭笑无常，呵欠频作等为特征的情志病。

V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V009-N01228.definition: 以精神抑郁,心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妇科杂病
V009-N01228.definition: 以精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V009-N01228.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V009-N01228.definition: 为主要表现的脑神疾病[3]。

V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V009-N01228.definition: 因情志不舒，郁火内扰，或天癸将绝之时，阴血亏虚，阴阳失调，气机紊乱，心神不宁所致。以神情抑郁，烦躁不宁，悲伤欲哭等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder
V009-N01228.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder
V009-N01228.path: 传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V009-N01228.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况

V009-N01228.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N01228.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder; Hysteria
V009-N01228.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01228.definition: A paroxysmal mental disorder in women characterized by mood swings, mind wandering, sadness with no apparent reason, restlessness, crying or laughing with unexplained reason and frequent sighing. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi disorder and consumes heart blood and spleen qi. It may also occur as a result of yin–yang disorder due to menopause.

V009-N01228.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁

V009-N01228.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01228.label: 脏躁
V009-N01228.definition: a paroxysmal mental disease marked by depression and melancholy, irritability, lack of control over emotions, sadness with an urge to weep, and sighing for no apparent reason

V009-N00210.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00210.label: 卑惵
V009-N00210.definition: 因秉质心胆气虚，或精血不足,复加调摄不当，屡遭喝斥、挫败，胆虚、神怯、志弱等积渐而成所致。临床以自卑怯懦，愧疚自责,恐惧畏缩，不能自已，情绪低落，甚则见人惊避，自闭不出等为特征的情志病。

V009-N00210.label: 卑惵
V009-N00210.englishNames: guilt complex due to heart blood insufficiency
V009-N00210.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V009-N00210.definition: 心血不足，神气失养，以神气衰颓，怕见人，居暗处，内疚，抑郁，自卑，重者自感有罪，他人错误也归自己，常欲赎罪，严重时成妄想或为精神分裂等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00210.label: 卑惵
V009-N00210.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00210.definition: 因心气亏损，胆虚神怯，或气郁胆气不宁所致。以抑郁，胆怯，自卑（卑），恐惧（惵 ）为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V009-N00210.label: 卑惵
V009-N00210.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V009-N00210.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00210.label: 卑惵
V009-N00210.englishNames: guilt complex; Low self-esteem; upset with timidity; "bi die" syndrome
V009-N00210.pinyinNames: bei die; bēi dié; bi die
V009-N00210.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00210.definition: Characterized by depression, timidity, self-inferiority and panic. In severe cases, emotional detachment may be present. Often results from gallbladder deficiency, heart qi insufficiency or disquieted gallbladder qi.

V009-N00361.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00361.label: 郁病
V009-N00361.definition: 因长期情志不遂,或性格内向、偏颇,致使气机郁滞,不得发越,初病在肝,及于心脾，久则郁损成劳所致。临床以抑郁寡欢,情绪不宁,善悲易怒,焦虑多疑,强迫自责,兴趣索然，情感淡漠,甚则有消极避世，自虐、自杀意念，伴见胸胁痞满、胀痛,纳差不食,虚烦、失眠,健忘,消瘦等为特征的情志病。

V009-N00361.label: 郁病
V009-N00361.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V009-N00361.definition: 以心情抑郁,情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛,或易怒易哭,或咽中如有异物梗塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00361.label: 郁病
V009-N00361.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V009-N00361.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，夜眠不安，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有物堵塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00361.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00361.label: 郁证
V009-N00361.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病｜肝病
V009-N00361.definition:
为主要表现的疾
病[21] 。

V009-N00361.label: 郁证
V009-N00361.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V009-N00361.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有异物哽塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00361.label: 郁病
V009-N00361.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V009-N00361.label: 郁证
V009-N00361.path: 传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V009-N00361.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00361.label: 郁病
V009-N00361.aliases: 郁证； Depression disorder； Depressive disorder； Melancholy disorder
V009-N00361.englishNames: depression disease; Depression; depressive disease; depression
V009-N00361.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00361.definition: Characterized by a low mood, lack of interest, fullness and stuffiness in the chest and subcostal region, and a poor appetite. In severe cases, a sense of guilt, dejection, paranoia, self-harm and tendency to commit suicide. Often occurs when long-term emotional disturbance or character defects causes qi to stagnate. It is first associated with the liver and later with the heart and spleen.

V009-N00361.label: 郁病

V009-N00361.label: 郁证

V009-N00249.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00249.label: 失眠
V009-N00249.definition: 临床以经常不能获得正常睡眠时间和质量等为特征的症状。多因思虑劳神太过，气血亏虚，或因情志所伤，气机不舒，以及火热内扰、痰浊阻滞等，使阴阳不和，神气不宁所致。

V009-N00249.label: 不寐
V009-N00249.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V009-N00249.definition: 又称"失眠”。经常性的睡眠减少，或不易入睡,或睡眠短浅而易醒，甚或彻夜不眠的表现。

V009-N00249.label: 不寐[病]
V009-N00249.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V009-N00249.definition: 又称“失眠”。以不易人睡或睡眠短浅易醒，甚至整夜不能入睡为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00249.label: 不寐
V009-N00249.aliases: 不得眠； 不眠； 目不瞑； 少寐； 少睡； 失眠； 睡眠减少； 无眠
V009-N00249.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V009-N00249.definition: 经常性的睡眠减少，或不易入睡，或睡眠短浅而易醒，甚或彻夜不眠的表现。

V009-N00249.label: 失眠
V009-N00249.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00249.label: 不寐
V009-N00249.path: 传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V009-N00249.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00249.label: 不寐
V009-N00249.aliases: 失眠； 不得眠； 不得卧； 不眠； 目不瞑； 少寐； 少睡； 无眠
V009-N00249.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00249.label: 不寐
V009-N00249.aliases: 不寐病； Insomnia disorder； Sleeplessness； 失眠
V009-N00249.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00249.definition: Characterized by an inability to obtain normal sleep and drowsiness and low energy during the day. Associated symptoms may include dizziness, tinnitus and poor memory. Often results from emotional disturbances, mental exhaustion and, subsequently, the disharmony between the Ying-nutrients and Wei-defence.

V009-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00249.label: 失眠
V009-N00249.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00249.definition: Prolonged inability to get sufficient sleep. Contributing factors may include over-thinking, deficiency of qi and blood, liver qi stagnation, internal fire heat, or retention of turbid phlegm. These factors may cause disharmony between yin and yang and subsequently, mental restlessness. It is often seen in sleeplessness, neurasthenia, depression, mania, hysteria and/or some systemic conditions.

V009-N00249.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00249.label: 失眠

V009-N00249.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00249.label: 失眠
V009-N00249.definition: inability to sleep or abnormal wakefulness, the same as insomnia

V009-N00030.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00030.label: 暴吐
V009-N00030.definition: 临床以突发呕吐，或暴吐如喷，不能自已，呕吐物多为食物、痰涎或胆汁等为特征的症状。多因暴饮暴食，或外感疫毒，或食物、药物中毒，邪毒犯胃，暴逆上冲所致。

V009-N00030.label: 暴吐
V009-N00030.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V009-N00030.definition: 以卒然呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00030.label: 暴吐
V009-N00030.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00030.definition: 以突发剧烈呕吐为主要表现的危急重证。

V009-N00030.label: 呕吐
V009-N00030.aliases: 暴吐； 但呕； 反呕； 呕不止； 呕多； 呕恶； 呕家； 呕逆； 呕吐不止； 其人必呕； 时呕； 吐逆； 微呕； 喜呕
V009-N00030.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V009-N00030.definition: 胃内容物，甚至胆汁、肠液通过食道反流到口腔，并吐出的反射性动作。

V009-N00030.label: 暴吐
V009-N00030.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语｜呕吐

V009-N00030.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00030.label: 暴吐
V009-N00030.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00030.definition: The occurrence of sudden, severe involuntary expulsion of food, phlegm or bile through the mouth. Contributing factors may include binge eating, pestilence or food/drug poisoning. These factors may cause fulminant ascending of stomach qi.

V009-N00193.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.definition: 临床以自觉膻中部位及偏左侧的心胸疼痛等为特征的症状。多因痰浊瘀血内阻，阳虚寒凝，或阴血亏虚等所致。

V009-N00193.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00193.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00193.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V009-N00193.definition: 因胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊、血瘀等留踞胸廓，或心气不足,鼓动乏力，致使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。临床以胸闷、气短及发作性心胸疼痛等为特征的心系病。

V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V009-N00193.definition: 又称“胸痹心痛”。气滞、血瘀、痰阻、寒凝等导致心脉挛急或闭塞，以膻中部位及左胸膺部疼痛，轻者仅感胸闷如室，呼吸欠畅；重者突然疼痛如刺、如灼、如绞， 面色苍白，大汗淋漓，四肢不温等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00193.label: 胸痹
V009-N00193.aliases: Pectoral Stuffiness Pain； 胸痹心痛
V009-N00193.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00193.definition: 是指胸部闷痛，甚则胸痛彻背，喘息不得卧为主症的一种疾病。轻者仅感胸闷隐痛，呼吸欠畅，重者则有胸痛，严重者心痛彻背，背痛彻心。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分

V009-N00193.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語

V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00193.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00193.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V009-N00193.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00193.label: 心痛
V009-N00193.englishNames: heart pain; Cardiac pain; heart pain [disease/disorder]
V009-N00193.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00193.definition: A subjective feeling of pain around the Danzhong point (Ren 17) and on the left side of the chest. Contributing factors may include internal phlegm turbidity and stagnant blood, cold retention due to yang deficiency, or yin blood deficiency. It is often seen in cardiac pain in chest bi-impediment, angina pectoris, heart bi-impediment, or heart heat.

V009-N00193.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00193.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00193.englishNames: Chest bi-impediment /cardiac pain; heartache due to chest impediment
V009-N00193.pinyinNames: xiong bi xin tong; xiōng bì xīn tòng
V009-N00193.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00193.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, shortness of breath and paroxysmal cardiac pain. Often occurs when heart qi fails to pump blood and results in malnourishment of the heart.

V009-N00281.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00281.label: 腹胀
V009-N00281.definition: 临床以自觉腹部胀满不适，或腹部膨胀、叩之有声等为特征的症状。多因湿热蕴结肝胆、脾虚气滞、寒湿困脾等所导致的各种急慢性病变。

V009-N00281.label: 腹胀[病]
V009-N00281.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脾胃病
V009-N00281.definition: 又称“腹满”。以腹部胀满为主要表现的疾病。fu zhāng shi re[yun jie] zheng

V009-N00281.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00281.label: 肠胃瘀滞
V009-N00281.englishNames:
Y瘀滞胃肠
肠胃胀气Flatulence
V009-N00281.path: 中医病证｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征
V009-N00281.definition: 属症状和体征自觉腹部胀满不舒，如物支撑，或伴腹部增大者[29]。 。

V009-N00281.label: 腹满
V009-N00281.aliases: 满病； 少腹满； 小腹满； 中满
V009-N00281.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜痞满
V009-N00281.definition: 属于胸腹症状。系指腹中有胀满之感而外无胀急之象而言。

V009-N00281.label: 腹胀
V009-N00281.englishNames: abdominal distension and fullness; abdominal distension
V009-N00281.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00281.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00281.label: 腹满
V009-N00281.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N00281.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00281.label: 腹满
V009-N00281.definition: a subjective feeling of fullness in the abdomen without pronounced visible or palpable expansion

V009-N01619.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.definition: 临床以牙齿酸楚、牙龈疼痛等为特征的症状。多因风邪侵袭，或胃火上炎，肾虚火浮，或脾虚气弱，或牙体腐蚀等所致。

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V009-N01619.definition: 以牙齿疼痛为主要表现的牙病。

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V009-N01619.definition: 痈肿发生于牙根尖处，以牙齿持续性剧痛、跳痛，牙龈及牙槽黏膜红肿、溢脓，牙齿浮出感，咬合时疼痛加重为主要表现的牙病。

V009-N01619.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 中医病证｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛
V009-N01619.definition: 属疼痛；属牙疾病自觉牙齿或牙龈疼痛的症状[3]。

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病
V009-N01619.definition: 外邪侵袭或脏腑失和所致的以牙齿疼痛为主要特征的病证。

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.aliases: 齿痛； 牙齿隐痛； 牙剧痛； 牙疼
V009-N01619.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜面部疼痛

V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N01619.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N01619.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01619.definition: Pain in the teeth and/or gum. Contributing factors may include exogenous wind, ascending of stomach fire, deficiency fire due to kidney deficiency, spleen qi deficiency, or tooth erosion. It is often seen in dental caries, gingival abscess, pericoronitis of wisdom tooth, or maxillary osteomyelitis.

V009-N01619.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01619.label: 牙痛
V009-N01619.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V009-N01619.definition: pain in a tooth or teeth

V009-N01543.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.definition: 临床以鼻中出血为特征的症状。多因鼻部疾患或外伤，或因肺、胃、肝经火热上扰,脾虚不能统血等所致。

V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病

V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.aliases: 鼻出血； 鼻腔出血； 鼽衄
V009-N01543.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血

V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N01543.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N01543.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄
V009-N01543.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01543.definition: The occurrence of bleeding from the nose. Contributing factors may include nasal problems, trauma, ascending of fire heat along the lung, stomach and liver meridians, or spleen deficiency. It is often seen in nasal trauma, bleeding disorders, measles, erysipelas, scarlet fever, flu, dizziness, aplastic anaemia, tympanites or severe headache due to ascending of kidney qi.

V009-N01543.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01543.label: 鼻衄

V009-N00387.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.definition: 临床以血随小便排出,或肉眼血尿,显微镜下红细胞阳性等为特征的症状。多因膀胱湿热、阴虚火旺、心火亢盛、疫毒或药毒等伤及肾与膀胱，损伤脉络所致。

V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V009-N00387.definition: 血从小便中排出，尿色因之而呈淡红、鲜红、 红赤，甚或夹杂血块。

V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜诊断
V009-N00387.definition: 排尿时尿液中有血的表现。

V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V009-N00387.definition: 小便中混有血液，甚或伴有血块的病证，称为尿血。

V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.aliases: 尿血淡红； 尿血鲜红； 尿血棕红； 尿中带血丝； 尿中夹血块； 血尿
V009-N00387.path: 症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜出血
V009-N00387.definition: 血从小便中排出，尿色因之而呈淡红、鲜红、红赤，甚或夹杂血块。

V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00387.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜排出物情况｜小便

V009-N00387.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.aliases: 溺血； 溲血； 血尿
V009-N00387.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N00387.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00387.label: 尿血
V009-N00387.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00387.definition: The brown or red discolouration of the urine. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, exuberance of heart fire, pestilence or toxic drug damaging the kidney and urinary bladder. It is often seen in stony stranguria, heat stranguria, pregnancy strangury, kidney heat, renal tuberculosis, kidney/bladder cancer, blood disorders, or contagious diseases.

V009-N00387.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00387.label: 尿血

V009-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00172.label: 暴咳病
V009-N00172.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳
V009-N00172.definition: 临床以急性发作，剧烈咳嗽，病程短等为特征的肺咳。

V009-N00172.label: 暴咳
V009-N00172.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00172.definition: 以骤然发作剧烈咳嗽为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00172.label: 暴咳
V009-N00172.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00172.definition: 以骤然发作剧烈咳嗽为主要表现的病症。

V009-N00172.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00172.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00172.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V009-N00172.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00172.definition: 属肺病；属中医儿科疾病从肺经喉发出“咳、咳”有声的症状。多因六淫外邪袭肺、有害气体刺激、痰饮停肺、气阴亏虚等而致肺失清肃宣降、肺气上逆所致。几乎所有肺系疾病均可见到咳嗽，它脏疾病亦可影响到肺而伴见咳嗽[3] 。

V009-N00172.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00172.aliases: 暴咳； 久咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V009-N00172.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00172.definition: 由六淫外邪侵袭肺系，或脏腑功能失调，内伤及肺，肺气不清，失于宣肃所成，临床以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现。若咳与嗽分别言之，则有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽。一般痰声多并见，难以截然分开，故以咳嗽并称。

V009-N00172.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00172.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00172.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00172.label: 暴咳病
V009-N00172.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳

V009-N00172.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00172.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00172.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00172.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00172.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00172.pinyinNames: ké sou; ke sou; ke su
V009-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00172.definition: The noisy expulsion of “cough” sound from the lungs. Contributing factors may include six exogenous pathogenic factors six exogenous pathogenic factors affecting the lung, exposure to irritant gas, phlegm fluid retention in the lung, or deficiency of qi and yin. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend. It is often seen in early-stage exogenous diseases, lung diseases, or conditions of other zang–fu organs that affect the lung.

V009-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00172.label: 暴咳病
V009-N00172.pinyinNames: bao ke bing; bào ké bìng
V009-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00172.definition: Characterized by severe coughing with an acute attack and a short duration.

V009-N00177.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00177.label: 内伤咳嗽
V009-N00177.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病
V009-N00177.definition: 因久咳伤肺，肺虚气弱，或由脏腑内伤,脾失健运，痰湿中阻，或肝火乘肺，或肾虚水泛，气阴两虚等所致。临床以咳嗽时轻时重,时作时止,咳痰或多或少,可伴见疲倦乏力,容易感冒,胸闷、喘促,胁肋疼痛，咯唾痰血，面目浮肿等为特征的慢性内伤肺系病。

V009-N00177.label: 内伤咳嗽
V009-N00177.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00177.definition: 肺气虚弱或他脏累肺引起的咳嗽。

V009-N00177.label: 内伤咳嗽
V009-N00177.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00177.definition: 由于肺气虚弱或其他脏腑病变累及于肺引起的咳嗽。

V009-N00177.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00177.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00177.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V009-N00177.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00177.definition: 属肺病；属中医儿科疾病从肺经喉发出“咳、咳”有声的症状。多因六淫外邪袭肺、有害气体刺激、痰饮停肺、气阴亏虚等而致肺失清肃宣降、肺气上逆所致。几乎所有肺系疾病均可见到咳嗽，它脏疾病亦可影响到肺而伴见咳嗽[3] 。

V009-N00177.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00177.aliases: 暴咳； 久咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V009-N00177.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00177.definition: 由六淫外邪侵袭肺系，或脏腑功能失调，内伤及肺，肺气不清，失于宣肃所成，临床以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现。若咳与嗽分别言之，则有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽。一般痰声多并见，难以截然分开，故以咳嗽并称。

V009-N00177.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00177.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00177.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V009-N00177.label: 内伤咳嗽
V009-N00177.englishNames: endogenous cough; cough due to internal damage
V009-N00177.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病

V009-N00177.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00177.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00177.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00177.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00177.label: 内伤咳嗽
V009-N00177.englishNames: Cough due to internal dysfunctions; endogenous cough; cough due to internal damage
V009-N00177.pinyinNames: nei shang ke su; nèi shāng ké sou
V009-N00177.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00177.definition: Characterized by intermittent coughs varying in intensity. Associated symptoms may include fatigue, frequent common colds, chest tightness, panting, pain in the subcostal region, haemoptysis and puffy face or eyes. Contributing factors may include chronic cough damaging lung qi, phlegm dampness due to spleen deficiency, liver fire affecting the lung, water retention due to kidney deficiency or deficiency of qi and yin.

V009-N00177.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00177.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00177.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00177.pinyinNames: ké sou; ke sou; ke su
V009-N00177.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00177.definition: The noisy expulsion of “cough” sound from the lungs. Contributing factors may include six exogenous pathogenic factors six exogenous pathogenic factors affecting the lung, exposure to irritant gas, phlegm fluid retention in the lung, or deficiency of qi and yin. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend. It is often seen in early-stage exogenous diseases, lung diseases, or conditions of other zang–fu organs that affect the lung.

V009-N00176.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00176.label: 外感咳嗽
V009-N00176.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病
V009-N00176.definition: 因六淫之邪犯肺，或温邪上受，肺卫失宣，肺气上逆所致。临床以起病较急，咳声急迫，或咳而不爽，或干咳、少痰,痰白或黄,可伴见发热、头痛，鼻塞、流涕,咽红、口干,喉痒或痛等为特征的急性外感肺系病。

V009-N00176.label: 外感咳嗽
V009-N00176.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00176.definition: 六淫之邪犯肺引起的咳嗽。

V009-N00176.label: 外感咳嗽
V009-N00176.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00176.definition: 六淫之邪犯肺引起的咳嗽。

V009-N00176.label: 咳嗽

V009-N00176.label: 外感咳嗽
V009-N00176.englishNames: exogenous cough; cough due to external contraction
V009-N00176.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病

V009-N00176.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00176.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00176.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00176.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00176.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00176.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V009-N00176.pinyinNames: ké sou; ke sou; ke su
V009-N00176.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00176.definition: The noisy expulsion of “cough” sound from the lungs. Contributing factors may include six exogenous pathogenic factors six exogenous pathogenic factors affecting the lung, exposure to irritant gas, phlegm fluid retention in the lung, or deficiency of qi and yin. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend. It is often seen in early-stage exogenous diseases, lung diseases, or conditions of other zang–fu organs that affect the lung.

V009-N00176.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00176.label: 外感咳嗽
V009-N00176.aliases: Cough upon exposure to exogenous factors
V009-N00176.englishNames: exogenous cough; cough due to external contraction; Cough due to external contraction
V009-N00176.pinyinNames: wai gan ke su; wài gǎn ké sou
V009-N00176.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00176.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset, urgent coughing sound, difficult expectoration of sputum, or coughing with scanty, yellow or white sputum. Associated symptoms include fever, headache, stuffy/runny nose, a red, sore and scratchy throat, and a dry mouth. Often occurs when six exogenous pathogenic factors or pestilence attack the lung and causes lung qi to ascend.

V009-N00206.label: 惊悸
V009-N00206.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病

V009-N00206.label: 惊悸
V009-N00206.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病

V009-N00206.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00206.label: 心悸
V009-N00206.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V009-N00206.definition: 为惊悸、怔忡，心动悸以心悸为主要特征，心系、脑系疾病常见心悸[3]。

V009-N00206.label: 惊悸

V009-N00206.label: 心悸
V009-N00206.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00206.definition: Unpleasant, involuntary sensations of rapid, irregular and/or forceful beating of the heart. Often results from failure of qi and blood to nourish the heart, emotions, exogenous pathogens affecting the heart or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart vessels. It is commonly seen in heart impediment, heart heat, lung conditions, emotional disorders, chronic debility, or thyroid problems.

V009-N00206.label: 惊悸

V009-N00411.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00411.label: 虚劳类病
V009-N00411.definition: 泛指因劳倦或饮食、七情、酒色等所伤，或大病后失于调理，致使阴阳或气血脏腑等虚损不复而引起的以气、血、阴、阳及五脏虚损等为特征的一类虚衰性疾病。

V009-N00411.label: 虚劳
V009-N00411.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V009-N00411.definition: 以阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损为主要表现的虚衰性疾病。

V009-N00411.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00411.label: 虚劳
V009-N00411.aliases: 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损
V009-N00411.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证
V009-N00411.definition: 为主，其次可伤及筋肉、经络及关节，多表现为虚证和慢性病[29]。

V009-N00411.label: 虚劳
V009-N00411.aliases: 内科虚劳杂病； 虚损
V009-N00411.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V009-N00411.definition: 又称虚损，是以脏腑功能衰退，气血阴阳不足为主要病机的多种慢性虚弱症候的总称。

V009-N00411.label: 虚劳类病
V009-N00411.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V009-N00411.label: 虚劳
V009-N00411.aliases: 六极（中医）； 五劳七伤； 虚损； 虚劳病
V009-N00411.englishNames: Consumptive Diseases; consumptive disease; Consumptive disorder
V009-N00411.path: 传统医学疾病｜气血津液病

V009-N00411.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00411.label: 虚劳类病
V009-N00411.englishNames: consumptive diseases diseases; category of consumptive disease; Deficiency/consumption
V009-N00411.pinyinNames: xu lao lei bing; xū láo lèi bìng
V009-N00411.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00411.definition: A collective term for chronic deficiency or consumption of qi, blood, yin, yang and the five zang organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, an improper diet, emotions, alcohol consumption, sexual indulgence or major medical conditions.

V009-N00411.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00411.label: 虚劳

V009-N00018.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00018.definition: 因恣饮暴食，或复感风寒，或因郁怒触动，食滞中焦，气逆上壅清空所致。临床以进食过多后昏厥，皖腹胀满，暖酸吞腐，脉滑实等为特征的厥病。

V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00018.definition: 暴饮暴食而致食积内停气机阻塞引起的厥证。

V009-N00018.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证｜厥证
V009-N00018.definition: 为主要表现的厥病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V009-N00018.definition: 因食填中脘，胃气不降，气逆于上，清窍闭阻而致，症见暴饮暴食，突然昏厥，脘腹胀满，呕呃酸腐，头晕，苔厚腻，脉滑。

V009-N00018.label: 饥厥
V009-N00018.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V009-N00018.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V009-N00018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00018.label: 食厥
V009-N00018.englishNames: crapulent syncope; Over-eating-induced syncope; Crapulent Syncope
V009-N00018.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00018.definition: Characterized by fainting after over-eating, abdominal distension and fullness, belching and a slippery, forceful pulse. Often results from binge eating. Alternatively, it may occur when wind cold or anger triggers the stagnant food in the spleen and stomach and causes qi to ascend to disturb the heart mind.

V009-N00018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00018.label: 饥厥
V009-N00018.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00018.definition: Characterized by sudden palpitations, weakness, cold sweats, a pale face and, in severe cases, sudden fainting may be present. Often results from failure of Ying nutrients to nourish the brain due to inability to eat food or hunger.

V009-N00018.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00018.label: 食厥

V009-N00014.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病
V009-N00014.definition: 因情绪紧张、恐惧，或因创伤剧痛，或为年老体弱，或突然改变体位，致使气机紊乱，脉络弛缓，清阳不升，脑失血养所致。临床以突然昏倒，面白、肢厥，神识不清等一过性症状为特征的厥脱病。

V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00014.definition: 失血过多，神明失养或血随气升，上冲清窍所致的厥证。

V009-N00014.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证｜厥证
V009-N00014.definition: 为年老体弱，或在突然改变体位等情况下，导致一时气机紊乱，脉络弛缓，清阳不升，脑失血养。以突然昏倒、面白肢厥、神识不清为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病[3]。

V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.englishNames: Bleed Fainting; Syncope Due to Excessive Bleeding; Syncope Resulting from Blood Disorder; Syncope Resulting from Disorders of the Blood
V009-N00014.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V009-N00014.definition: 多因急躁恼怒而发，突然昏倒，不知人事，牙关紧闭，面赤唇紫，舌暗红，脉弦有力。病机为怒而气上，血随气升，蒙闭清窍。

V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.aliases: 脉厥； Blood Syncope； Syncope due to Excessive Bleeding
V009-N00014.englishNames: blood syncope; Bleeding Syncope; syncope due to excessive bleeding
V009-N00014.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V009-N00014.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V009-N00014.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00014.label: 血厥
V009-N00014.aliases: 脉厥； Blood Syncope； Syncope due to Excessive Bleeding； Blood syncope disorder
V009-N00014.englishNames: blood syncope; Bleeding Syncope; Blood syncope; syncope due to excessive bleeding
V009-N00014.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00014.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, a pale face, cold limbs and transient mental cloudiness. Contributing factors may include nervousness, fear, intense traumatic pain, ageing or a sudden change in posture. These factors may disturb qi activity and result in the failure of blood to nourish the brain.

V009-N00014.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00014.label: 血厥

V009-N00378.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00378.label: 风厥
V009-N00378.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病
V009-N00378.definition: 因风毒扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾,气机阻闭,甚或阳气欲脱所致。临床以胸闷、心悸,呼吸困难，肢厥、脉微，皮肤瘙痒，血压降低，神志异常等为特征的厥脱病。

V009-N00378.label: 风厥
V009-N00378.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V009-N00378.definition: 风毒突致，扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾，阳气欲脱，以胸闷心悸，呼吸困难，肢厥脉微，皮肤瘙痒，神志异常等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00378.label: 风厥
V009-N00378.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V009-N00378.definition: 因风毒突致，扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾，气机阻闭，甚至阳气欲脱。以胸闷心悸，呼吸困难，肢厥脉微，皮肤瘙痒，血压降低，神志异常等为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V009-N00378.label: 风厥
V009-N00378.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V009-N00378.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00378.label: 风厥
V009-N00378.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00378.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, difficulty breathing, cold limbs, a feeble pulse, skin itching, low blood pressure and mental cloudiness. Often results from wind disturbing or blocking qi and blood or yang qi collapse.

V009-N00378.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00378.label: 风厥

V009-N00012.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00012.label: 厥病
V009-N00012.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病
V009-N00012.definition: 泛指因情志刺激，或饥饱不定，或六淫、温毒、痰湿、药毒、食毒等邪闭塞气机，气血逆乱而引起的、以突然晕厥或昏仆，四肢逆冷等为特征的一类急症。

V009-N00012.label: 厥证
V009-N00012.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V009-N00012.definition: 以突然昏倒,不省人事,或伴四肢逆冷为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V009-N00012.label: 厥证
V009-N00012.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00012.definition: 以突然昏倒，不省人事为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V009-N00012.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00012.label: 厥证
V009-N00012.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证
V009-N00012.definition: 为主要表现的疾病的统称[21]。

V009-N00012.label: 厥证
V009-N00012.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00012.definition: 是指由于阴阳失调、气机逆乱所引起的，以突然昏倒，不省人事，或伴有四肢逆冷为主要临床表现的一种急性病证。病机多为情志内伤、久病体虚、亡血失津、饮食不节。

V009-N00012.label: 厥病
V009-N00012.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V009-N00012.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00012.label: 厥病
V009-N00012.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00012.definition: A group of emergent conditions characterized by sudden fainting and cold limbs. Contributing factors may include mental stress, eating disorder, six exogenous pathogenic factors, pestilence, phlegm dampness, drug poisoning or food poisoning. These factors may block the flow of qi and cause the disorder of qi and blood.

V009-N00012.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00012.label: 厥证

V009-N00019.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00019.definition: 因置身于高温或酷暑环境，火热或暑热之邪内侵，热盛伤阴，扰乱神明所致。临床以四肢厥逆，身热无汗，颜面潮红，唇干舌燥，小便短赤，大便燥结，甚或不省人事等为特征的厥病。

V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00019.definition: 邪热过盛，格阴于外，或阳郁于里不能外达所致的厥证。

V009-N00019.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证｜厥证

V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.aliases: 阳厥； Heat Syncope； 煎厥
V009-N00019.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V009-N00019.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00019.label: 热厥
V009-N00019.aliases: 阳厥； Heat Syncope； Yang syncope； 煎厥
V009-N00019.englishNames: heat syncope; Heat Syncope Syndrome; Heat syncope
V009-N00019.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00019.definition: Characterized by cold extremities up to the elbows and knees or beyond, body fever without sweating, a flushed face, a dry tongue and lips, scanty, dark yellow urine, and dry stools. In severe cases, unconsciousness may be present. Often results from exposure to hot environment for a prolonged period or severe fire heat/summer heat damaging yin or disturbing the heart mind.

V009-N00019.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00019.label: 热厥

V009-N00013.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00013.definition: 因精神刺激，气机郁闭，或中气虚脱，清阳不升所致。临床以突然昏厥,移时复苏，或伴有感觉、运动障碍，但无脏腑器质性损害为特征的厥病。

V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.englishNames: syncope due to disorder of qi
V009-N00013.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V009-N00013.definition: 气机佛郁上逆所致的厥证。

V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00013.definition: 中气衰竭，或气机逆乱蒙闭诸窍所致的厥证。

V009-N00013.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜内伤病证｜厥证
V009-N00013.definition: 属厥证因精神刺激、情志不舒、气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥、过时复醒，或有感觉、运动障碍，但无脏腑形器损害的厥病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.englishNames: Syncope Due to Disorder of the Vital Energy; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of Qi; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of the Vi-tal Energy
V009-N00013.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V009-N00013.definition: 因精神刺激，情志不舒，气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥，不知人事，或四肢厥冷、呼吸气粗、口噤握拳、舌苔薄白，脉伏或沉弦。

V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi
V009-N00013.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V009-N00013.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V009-N00013.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V009-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00013.label: 气厥
V009-N00013.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi； Qi syncope disorder
V009-N00013.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; Qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V009-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00013.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting (patients recover after some time). Some may also experience sensory or motor disturbance but no organic pathological changes. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi to stagnate or when clear yang fails to ascend due to spleen qi deficiency.

V009-N00013.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00013.label: 气厥

V009-N00023.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00023.label: 气厥
V009-N00023.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00023.definition: 因精神刺激，气机郁闭，或中气虚脱，清阳不升所致。临床以突然昏厥,移时复苏，或伴有感觉、运动障碍，但无脏腑器质性损害为特征的厥病。

V009-N00023.label: 郁厥
V009-N00023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V009-N00023.definition: 郁病昏厥。以腹内结块，或痛或胀为主要表现的疾病。腹内结块,固定不移,并伴胀痛或刺痛为特征者称为积。腹中气聚,攻窜胀痛，时作时止为特征者称为聚。

V009-N00023.label: 郁厥
V009-N00023.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症

V009-N00023.label: 气厥
V009-N00023.englishNames: Syncope Due to Disorder of the Vital Energy; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of Qi; Syncope Resulting From Disorder of the Vi-tal Energy
V009-N00023.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V009-N00023.definition: 因精神刺激，情志不舒，气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥，不知人事，或四肢厥冷、呼吸气粗、口噤握拳、舌苔薄白，脉伏或沉弦。

V009-N00023.label: 气厥
V009-N00023.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi
V009-N00023.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V009-N00023.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V009-N00023.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00023.label: 气厥
V009-N00023.aliases: 郁厥； Qi Syncope Syndrome； Syncope due to Disorder of Qi； Qi syncope disorder
V009-N00023.englishNames: Qi Syncope; qi syncope; Qi syncope; syncope due to disorder of qi
V009-N00023.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00023.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting (patients recover after some time). Some may also experience sensory or motor disturbance but no organic pathological changes. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi to stagnate or when clear yang fails to ascend due to spleen qi deficiency.

V009-N00021.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00021.definition: 因饮酒过量，酒气上攻，神明失主所致。临床以酒醉时亢奋、烦躁,呕吐，气促,酣睡，甚则突然昏厥等为特征的厥病。

V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症

V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V009-N00021.definition: 一次过量饮酒，酒气上攻，神明失主。以烦躁、欲呕、气喘、酣睡昏厥为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.englishNames: alcoholic syncope; syncope due to immoderate drinking; alcoholism syncope
V009-N00021.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜晕厥

V009-N00021.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00021.label: 酒厥
V009-N00021.englishNames: alcoholic syncope; syncope due to immoderate drinking; alcoholism syncope; Alcoholic syncope
V009-N00021.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00021.definition: Characterized by restlessness, vomiting, sleepiness, and panting. In severe cases, fainting and cold limbs may be present. It occurs when excessive alcohol drinking affects the heart mind.

V009-N00377.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00377.label: 中恶
V009-N00377.path: 气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V009-N00377.definition: 因神气不足，卒感秽浊不正之气,或入阴森恐惧处等，神明被蒙所致。临床以突发头晕、呕恶,呼吸困难，不省人事，移时或经治而解等为特征的厥病。

V009-N00377.label: 中恶
V009-N00377.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V009-N00377.definition: 神气不足，卒感秽浊不正之气，以突然头晕呕恶，呼吸困难，不省人事，移时或经治而解为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00377.label: 中恶
V009-N00377.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V009-N00377.definition: 因神气不足，卒感秽浊不正之气，或入阴森恐惧之处等，神明被蒙。以突然头晕呕恶，呼吸困难，不省人事，移时或经治而解为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V009-N00377.label: 中恶
V009-N00377.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
