V009-N00195.label: 真心痛

V009-N00196.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛
V009-N00196.definition: 因五脏虚损,七情所伤,气逆乘心,或寒热诸邪逆犯心包,痰瘀阻痹,心经气逆所致。临床以心痛彻背、背痛彻心,劳累则甚,静息则缓，可伴见气从皖腹上冲咽喉,胸脘痞闷,善太息,甚则手足逆冷,面色青黑等为特征的阵发性真心痛。

V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00196.definition: 一种较真心痛为轻的心系疾病，以心痛发作时伴四肢厥冷为主要临床特征。

V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V009-N00196.definition: 以心痛发作时伴四肢厥冷为主要表现的轻症真心痛。

V009-N00196.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜胸痹
V009-N00196.definition: 为主要表现的痛症类疾病[3]。

V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.englishNames: Precordial Pain Caused by Cold-evil; Precordial Pain With Cold Limbs
V009-N00196.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00196.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或瘀痰阻痹，心脉闭塞所致。以心胸剧痛，甚至持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷、面白唇青、脉微欲绝为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.englishNames: Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs; precordial pain; true heart pain with cold limbs
V009-N00196.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V009-N00196.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00196.label: 厥心痛
V009-N00196.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V009-N00196.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V009-N00196.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00196.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V009-N00034.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛
V009-N00034.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛
V009-N00034.definition: 因脏腑虚弱，风寒诸邪直中心络，或痰瘀痹塞心脉所致。临床以猝发心胸刺痛、绞痛，痛不得息，甚或伴见室闷濒死感等为特征的突发性真心痛。

V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛
V009-N00034.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00034.definition: 突然发作心胸剧痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛
V009-N00034.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00034.definition: 突发心胸剧痛为主要表现的危急重证。

V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛
V009-N00034.englishNames: sudden heart pain; sudden precordial pain
V009-N00034.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V009-N00034.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛
V009-N00034.englishNames: sudden heart pain; Sudden cardiac pain; sudden cardiac pain; sudden precordial pain
V009-N00034.pinyinNames: zu xin tong; zú xīn tòng
V009-N00034.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00034.definition: Characterized by sudden, stabbing cardiac pain, angina and shortness of breath. In severe cases, feeling of impending death may be present. Often results from deficiency of zang–fu organs, wind cold directly attacking the heart or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V009-N00034.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00034.label: 卒心痛

V009-N00203.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00203.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00203.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V009-N00203.definition: 因胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊、血瘀等留踞胸廓，或心气不足,鼓动乏力，致使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。临床以胸闷、气短及发作性心胸疼痛等为特征的心系病。

V009-N00203.label: 胸痹
V009-N00203.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V009-N00203.definition: 以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00203.label: 胸痹
V009-N00203.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V009-N00203.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00203.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00203.label: 胸痹
V009-N00203.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病
V009-N00203.definition: 为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00203.label: 胸痹
V009-N00203.aliases: Pectoral Stuffiness Pain； 胸痹心痛
V009-N00203.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00203.definition: 是指胸部闷痛，甚则胸痛彻背，喘息不得卧为主症的一种疾病。轻者仅感胸闷隐痛，呼吸欠畅，重者则有胸痛，严重者心痛彻背，背痛彻心。病因为寒邪内侵、饮食失调、情志失节、年迈体弱。病机为心脉痹阻，病位在心，涉及肝脾肾等。

V009-N00203.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00203.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V009-N00203.label: 胸痹
V009-N00203.englishNames: chest bi; chest painful impediment; Chest Discomfort; chest impediment; chest discomfort; Chest impediment disorders
V009-N00203.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病类

V009-N00203.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00203.label: 胸痹心痛
V009-N00203.englishNames: Chest bi-impediment /cardiac pain; heartache due to chest impediment
V009-N00203.pinyinNames: xiong bi xin tong; xiōng bì xīn tòng
V009-N00203.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00203.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, shortness of breath and paroxysmal cardiac pain. Often occurs when heart qi fails to pump blood and results in malnourishment of the heart.

V009-N00203.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00203.label: 胸痹

V009-N00247.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00247.label: 痫病
V009-N00247.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V009-N00247.definition: 因先天遗传,或大惊卒恐、情志失调,饮食不节,或继发于脑部疾患、高热、中毒、头颅损伤,使风痰、瘀血等蒙蔽清空，扰乱神明所致。临床以突然昏仆，口吐涎沫,肢体抽搐,两目凝视,或作各种怪叫声,移时苏醒则如常人等为特征的反复发作性神志病。

V009-N00247.label: 痫病
V009-N00247.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V009-N00247.definition: 以突然昏仆，口吐涎沫，肢体抽搐，移时苏醒，反复发作为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00247.label: 癇病
V009-N00247.aliases: 癫痫； 痫病； 痫证； 羊痫风
V009-N00247.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V009-N00247.definition: 系指脏腑功能失调，气机逆乱，元神失控所致的一种发作性神志异常疾病。以突然意识丧失，发则仆倒，不省人事，两目上视，口吐涎沫，四肢抽搐，或口中怪叫，移时苏醒，一如常人为主要临床表现的一种发作性疾病。

V009-N00247.label: 痫病
V009-N00247.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V009-N00247.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00247.label: 痫病
V009-N00247.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00247.definition: A condition characterized by a long-term risk of recurrent seizures. Clinical signs and symptoms include sudden unconsciousness, drooling, convulsions of the limbs, upward staring of the eyes often preceded by vocalizations. Contributing factors may include heredity, fear/fright, emotional disturbance, or improper diet. It may occur secondary to brain diseases, high fever, poisoning or head trauma. These factors can cause wind phlegm or stagnant blood to cloud the heart mind.

V009-N00247.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00247.label: 痫病

V009-N00247.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00247.label: 癫痫
V009-N00247.aliases: 癫疾； 痫病； 痫证
V009-N00247.definition: a disease characterized by temporary loss of consciousness with foaming at the mouth and convulsions of the limbs, and return to normal after the episode

V009-N01273.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01273.label: 肺系病
V009-N01273.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语
V009-N01273.definition: 泛指由六淫或七情、劳损、水饮、瘀血等因素引起肺腑及其络属经络功能障碍的一类疾病。

V009-N01273.label: 肺系病
V009-N01273.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语

V009-N01273.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01273.label: 肺系病
V009-N01273.englishNames: category of lung system disease; Lung system diseases; lung system diseases
V009-N01273.pinyinNames: fei xi bing; fèi xì bìng
V009-N01273.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01273.definition: Dysfunctions of the lung system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, over-exertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V009-N00180.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00180.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00180.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00180.definition: 因先天不足，或久病肺、脾、肾三脏虚损,致使宿痰留伏体内，或由外邪引动，痰阻气道所致。临床以发作性咳喘、气促，胸廓胀满，端坐呼吸,喉中哮鸣有声,甚则喘息不得平卧等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00180.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V009-N00180.definition: 因禀赋异常,触及粉尘或刺激性气体等即发，或因外邪、劳累及饮食、情志失调等诱发，引动宿痰留饮,痰气交阻,气道挛急所致。临床以突发呼吸急促,喉中哮鸣有声,不得平卧，发作前可见鼻痒、喷嚏，咳嗽、胸闷等先兆症状为特征的反复发作性肺系病。

V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00180.definition: 又称"哮喘”。以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00180.definition: 又称“哮喘”。以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00180.definition: 是由于宿痰伏肺，遇诱因或感邪引触，以致痰阻气道，肺失肃降，气道挛急所致发作性的痰鸣气喘疾患。发作时喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸气促困难，甚则喘息不能平卧为主要表现。

V009-N00180.label: 喘证
V009-N00180.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00180.definition: 是指由于感受外邪，痰浊内蕴，情志失调而致肺气上逆，失于宣降，或久病气虚，肾失摄纳，以呼吸困难，甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动，不能平卧等为主要临床表现的一种常见病证。严重者可致喘脱。

V009-N00180.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00180.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V009-N00180.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V009-N00180.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00180.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00180.label: 哮喘
V009-N00180.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜病理声音情况｜呼吸声

V009-N00180.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00180.label: 哮喘病
V009-N00180.pinyinNames: xiao chuan bing; xiào chuǎn bìng
V009-N00180.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00180.definition: Characterized by recurrent episodes of difficulty breathing, wheezing and shortness of breath with an inability to lie flat. Contributing factors may include congenital deficiency or impaired functions of the lung, spleen and kidney. These factors may generate phlegm to obstruct the airway.

V009-N00180.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00180.label: 哮病
V009-N00180.aliases: 哮喘； 哮证； Wheezing disorder； Wheezing pattern
V009-N00180.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing disease; wheezing; Wheezing; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V009-N00180.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00180.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V009-N00180.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00180.label: 哮喘

V009-N00180.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00180.label: 哮病

V009-N00028.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00028.label: 暴喘
V009-N00028.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V009-N00028.definition: 因素有喘疾，复由外感或内伤引发，肺气上逆，肾失摄纳，气无所主所致。临床以突发痰鸣喘促，汗出淋漓，不能平卧，胸高、胁胀，面暗、唇绀等为特征的急性肺系病重症。

V009-N00028.label: 暴喘
V009-N00028.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00028.definition: 以突然剧烈喘急，呼吸急促，张口抬肩，不能平卧，四肢厥冷，大汗淋漓，唇肢青紫为主要表现的疾病。肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短而喘，唇舌紫紺为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00028.label: 暴喘
V009-N00028.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00028.definition: 以痰鸣如吼，气息喘促，汗出淋漓，不能平卧，胸高胁胀，面色发暗，苔黄黏腻，脉滑数等为主要表现的危急重证。

V009-N00028.label: 暴喘
V009-N00028.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V009-N00028.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00028.label: 暴喘
V009-N00028.englishNames: sudden dyspnea; Fulminant wheezing; fulminant dyspnea
V009-N00028.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00028.definition: An acute, severe condition characterized by sudden wheezing, shortness of breath, sweating, an inability to lie flat, bulging chest, subcostal distension, a dark complexion, and cyanosis of the lips. Contributing factors include a history of chronic asthma, exposure to exogenous pathogens or dysfunction of the internal organs. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend and impair the function of the kidney to absorb qi.

V009-N00028.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00028.label: 暴喘

V009-N00183.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00183.label: 喘病
V009-N00183.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V009-N00183.definition: 因外感风寒邪热束肺,或痰浊壅肺，痰气交结，肃降无权，或因先天不足，久咳伤肺，肾不纳气等所致。临床以气短喘促,呼吸困难,稍动尤甚,甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动,不得平卧,伴见咳嗽、痰多,胸闷、紫绀，胸高胁胀等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00183.label: 喘病
V009-N00183.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00183.definition: 因久患肺系疾病或他脏病变影响,致肺气上逆肃降无权，以气短喘促为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00183.label: 喘病
V009-N00183.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00183.definition: 以气短喘促等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00183.label: 喘病
V009-N00183.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V009-N00183.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00183.label: 喘病
V009-N00183.aliases: 喘证； Dyspnoea disorder； Dyspnoea pattern
V009-N00183.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00183.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, rapid breathing, and difficulty breathing that worsens upon exertion. In severe cases, breathing with an open mouth and elevated shoulder, nasal flaring and an inability to lie flat may be present. Associated symptoms may include cough with profuse phlegm, chest tightness, cyanosis, raised chest and distension in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include heredity, exogenous pathogenic wind cold affecting the lung, turbid phlegm accumulating in the lung, chronic cough damaging lung qi or kidney failing to absorb qi.

V009-N00174.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00174.label: 久咳病
V009-N00174.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳
V009-N00174.definition: 临床以咳嗽经久不愈，或反复发作，慢性病程为特征的肺咳。

V009-N00174.label: 久咳
V009-N00174.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00174.definition: 以咳嗽经久不愈为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00174.label: 咳嗽
V009-N00174.aliases: 暴咳； 久咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽
V009-N00174.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00174.definition: 由六淫外邪侵袭肺系，或脏腑功能失调，内伤及肺，肺气不清，失于宣肃所成，临床以咳嗽、咯痰为主要表现。若咳与嗽分别言之，则有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽。一般痰声多并见，难以截然分开，故以咳嗽并称。

V009-N00174.label: 久咳病
V009-N00174.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳

V009-N00174.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00174.label: 久咳病
V009-N00174.pinyinNames: jiǔ ké bìng; jiu ke bing
V009-N00174.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00174.definition: Characterized by persistent, recurrent coughing with a prolonged period.

V009-N00187.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00187.definition: 因热毒壅肺、使肺叶生疮，血败肉腐，形成痈脓所致。临床以骤然发热，咳嗽,胸痛，咯腥臭脓血痰等为特征的急性肺系病。

V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00187.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，胸痛，咯腥臭脓血痰为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00187.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病

V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00187.definition: 是肺叶生疮，形成脓疡的一种病证，属于内痈之一。临床以发热，咳嗽，胸痛，咯吐腥臭浊痰，甚则脓血相兼为主要表现。

V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.englishNames: abscess of lung; lung abscess; Pulmonary Abscess
V009-N00187.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00187.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00187.label: 肺痈
V009-N00187.englishNames: abscess of lung; lung abscess; Lung abscess; Pulmonary Abscess; lund abscess
V009-N00187.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00187.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, cough, chest pain and expectoration of strong-odoured pus/blood-stained sputum. Often occurs when toxic heat accumulates in the lung, causes sores or ulcers in the lung lobes and over time, forms abscesses.

V009-N00187.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00187.label: 肺痈

V009-N00437.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00437.label: 肺痹
V009-N00437.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00437.definition: 因风寒痰湿等邪蕴肺,或肺胀、肺痿等久病伤肺，肺中虚冷,痰瘀互结,痹阻肺络所致。临床以喘促憋闷,胸膈胀满,动辄尤甚,干咳、少痰,痰白泡沫,面色黯黑，口唇紫紺，可伴见呕吐,胸高、胁胀,甚则呼吸困难，浮肿，心悸等为特征的持续进行性肺系病。

V009-N00437.label: 肺痹
V009-N00437.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肢体病
V009-N00437.definition: 外感寒热之邪，或饮食过冷过热，或悲忧伤肺，以烦满喘呕，逆气上冲，右胁刺痛，放射至锁骨上窝及右臂、腋下，脉或迟弦或洪数等为常见症的痹病。

V009-N00437.label: 肺痹
V009-N00437.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00437.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00437.label: 肺痹

V009-N00188.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00188.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，使肺叶枯萎或痿弱不用所致。临床以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V009-N00188.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短、咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00188.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00188.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00188.definition: 为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00188.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，致肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用。以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.englishNames: lung wilting; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V009-N00188.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.englishNames: lung wilting; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V009-N00188.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00188.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00188.label: 肺痿
V009-N00188.englishNames: lung wilting; lund withering disease; atrophic lung disease; Atrophy of the lung lobes; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V009-N00188.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00188.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath and cough with expectoration of turbid sputum. Often occurs when chronic cough damages lung qi, consumes fluids and results in withering or disuse of the lung lobes.

V009-N00188.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00188.label: 肺痿

V009-N00170.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00170.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00170.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00170.definition: 因邪热入肺，或脏腑癣热及肺，痰热壅肺，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，痰黄而稠，或痰中夹血，口渴，可伴见潮热、寒热，胸胁肋痛，大便秘结，小便黄等为特征的肺系病。

V009-N00170.label: 肺热病
V009-N00170.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00170.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00170.label: 肺热病
V009-N00170.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00170.definition: 风热病毒犯肺，热壅肺气，肺失清肃。以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V009-N00170.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00170.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00170.label: 肺热病
V009-N00170.englishNames: Lung heat disorder; lung heat disease
V009-N00170.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00170.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00170.label: 肺瘅
V009-N00170.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00170.definition: Characterized by cough with sticky, yellow phlegm or blood-stained sputum and thirst. Associated symptoms may include tidal fever, chills, pain in the subcostal region, constipation and yellow urine. Often occurs when pathogenic heat, heat of zang–fu organs or phlegm heat affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V009-N00186.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00186.label: 肺厥病
V009-N00186.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00186.definition: 因肺气衰竭，清浊相干，上壅清空所致。临床以肺病久治不愈，突发呼吸急促，神志淡漠，肌肉震颤，间歇抽搐或躁动，嗜睡、昏睡，甚至昏迷，伴见四肢厥冷等为特征的肺系病重症。

V009-N00186.label: 肺厥
V009-N00186.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00186.definition: 以喘促，神志昏蒙为主要表现的肺病及脑的疾病。

V009-N00186.label: 肺厥
V009-N00186.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00186.definition: 由肺气衰竭，清气匮乏，浊气内蓄，脑神清窍失养。在肺病症状基础上，以神识昏蒙为主要表现的肺病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V009-N00186.label: 肺厥病
V009-N00186.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00186.label: 肺厥
V009-N00186.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00186.definition: Characterized by sudden rapid breathing, mental cloudiness and cold limbs. Often occurs when prolonged lung disorders cause lung qi exhaustion or turbid phlegm to ascend to mist the mind.

V009-N00185.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V009-N00185.definition: 因肺咳、哮病久治不愈，肺气壅滞，久胀不敛，肺叶充胸胀廓所致。临床以胸廓膨胀，憋闷喘息，咳嗽、痰多，动辄气促，面色晦暗，唇舌紫绀，甚或喘脱，咯血，神昏等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V009-N00185.definition: 肺叶久胀不敛，以胸中胀闷，咳嗽咯痰，气短而喘，唇舌紫紺为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00185.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.path: 中医病证｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肺病
V009-N00185.definition: 为主要表现的肺系疾病[3]。

V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00185.definition: 是指多种慢性肺系疾患反复发作，迁延不愈，肺脾肾三脏虚损，从而导致肺管不利，肺气壅滞，气道不畅，胸膺胀满不能敛降。临床表现见喘息气促，咳嗽，咯痰，胸部膨满，憋闷如塞，或唇甲紫绀，心悸浮肿等症。重者可出现昏迷、喘脱等危重证候。

V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung Distention
V009-N00185.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung Distention
V009-N00185.path: 传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V009-N00185.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00185.label: 肺胀
V009-N00185.englishNames: lung distention; lung distension; Lung distension disorder; lungdistention; Lung distension; Lung Distention
V009-N00185.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00185.definition: Characterized by chest stuffiness or distension, cough with expectoration of sputum, shortness of breath and panting upon exertion. In severe cases, a raised chest, distention in the subcostal region and cyanosis of the lips and tongue may be present. Often occurs when chronic cough or wheezing causes lung qi to stagnate.

V009-N00185.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00185.label: 肺胀

V009-N00046.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00046.label: 伤寒类病
V009-N00046.definition: 泛指因感受风寒等邪而引起的，初起以寒象偏重、易于损伤阳气等为特征的一类外感病。

V009-N00046.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V009-N00046.label: 伤寒
V009-N00046.englishNames: yin exchange of exogenous cold disease
V009-N00046.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜阴阳易｜阴易
V009-N00046.definition: 以健康男人与伤寒初愈的女人性交而得病为特征的阴易。

V009-N00046.label: 伤寒
V009-N00046.englishNames: exogenous cold disease, cold damage (2)exogenous febrile disease
V009-N00046.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00046.definition: (1)感受风寒之邪引起的外感热病。(2)泛指外感热病。

V009-N00046.label: 伤寒

V009-N00095.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00095.definition: 因冬季温邪或疫毒侵袭肺卫,或上扰清空所致。临床以头痛、发热,咳嗽、咽痛,汗出、烦渴,甚或高热不已，神昏、谵语、痉厥、抽搐等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N00095.label: 冬温
V009-N00095.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病

V009-N00095.label: 冬温
V009-N00095.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病

V009-N00095.label: 冬温病

Often occurs when pathogenic winter warmth or epidemic toxin attacks the Wei-defence or disturbs the mind.

V009-N00115.definition: 因感受风热疫毒,壅遏少阳经脉,郁结于腮颊所致。临床以发热，一侧或两侧耳下腮颊部灼热漫肿，坚硬疼痛，甚或并发神昏，抽搐，睾丸肿痛等为特征，多见于儿童的温疫病。

V009-N00115.aliases: 腮肿； 蛤蟆瘟； 含腮疮； 腮颌发； 小儿痄腮； 鸬鹚瘟； Parotic Swelling
V009-N00115.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00115.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00115.label: 痄腮
V009-N00115.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N00115.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00115.label: 痄腮
V009-N00115.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V009-N00115.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00115.label: 痄腮
V009-N00115.aliases: 腮肿； 蛤蟆瘟； 含腮疮； 腮颌发； 小儿痄腮； 鸬鹚瘟； Parotic Swelling； Parotitis
V009-N00115.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00115.definition: An epidemic disease characterized by fever and diffuse swelling and pain on one or both sides of the parotid glands. In severe cases, unconsciousness, convulsions and painful, swollen testis. Often affects children and results from retained phlegm fire in the cheek following wind heat toxin entering the body via the mouth and nose.

V009-N00115.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00115.label: 痄腮

V009-N00115.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00115.label: 瘟

V009-N00115.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N00115.label: 痄腮
V009-N00115.definition: an epidemic disease caused by wind-heat toxin and characterized by painful swelling of one or both parotid glands

V009-N00114.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00114.label: 软脚瘟
V009-N00114.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00114.definition: 因暑湿疫毒侵袭胃肠,蕴于肌肉,阻滞经络,或热伤阴液，筋失濡养，筋脉弛缓不用所致。临床以双峰热，头痛,腹痛、腹泻，肌肤疼痛,肌肉软瘫，日久肌肉萎缩,步履不便,受累肢体畸形等后遗症为特征，常见于儿童的温疫病。

V009-N00114.label: 软脚瘟
V009-N00114.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00114.definition: 以便清泄白，足癘难移等为常见症的瘟疫。

V009-N00114.label: 软脚瘟
V009-N00114.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V009-N00114.definition: 外感暑湿热毒而致一足麻痹痿废之病证，称软脚瘟。

V009-N00114.label: 软脚瘟
V009-N00114.englishNames: pestilence with flaccid leg; pestilent flaccidity of foot
V009-N00114.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00114.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00114.label: 软脚瘟
V009-N00114.englishNames: Flaccid foot pestilence; pestilence with flaccidity of foot; pestilence with flaccid leg; pestilent flaccidity of foot
V009-N00114.pinyinNames: ruǎn jiǎo wēn; ruan jiao wen
V009-N00114.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00114.definition: Characterized by double-peaked fever, headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, pain in the surface of the body, muscle flaccidity/weakness that develops into atrophy, unstable walking, and malformation of the affected limbs. It commonly affects children with pestilence. This condition often occurs when summer dampness affect the intestines and stomach, accumulates in the muscles and obstructs meridians. Alternatively, it may occur when heat damages yin fluids and results in malnourishment of the sinews.

V009-N00042.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00042.label: 风温病
V009-N00042.aliases: 风温； 风温肺热病； 风瘟病； 风瘟
V009-N00042.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00042.definition: 因风温邪毒侵袭肺卫,邪热壅肺，甚或逆传心包所致。临床以突然发热，微恶风寒,咳嗽，痰黄，或咯唾痰血，咽痛,继而高热不已,汗出、烦渴，胸闷、喘急,甚或伴见神昏、谵语、抽搐等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N00042.label: 风温肺热病
V009-N00042.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00042.definition: 感受风热病毒，冬春两季多发，以发热，咳嗽，咯痰，口干渴，舌红，苔白或黄，脉数为主要表现的急性外感热病。

V009-N00042.label: 风温肺热病
V009-N00042.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病证
V009-N00042.definition: 风温肺热病是由风热病邪犯肺，热壅肺气，肺失清肃所致，以发热，咳嗽，胸痛等为主要临床表现。相当于急性肺部炎性病变。

V009-N00042.label: 风温病
V009-N00042.aliases: 风瘟； 风瘟病； 风温； 风温肺热病
V009-N00042.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00042.label: 风温病
V009-N00042.aliases: 风瘟； 风瘟病； 风温； 风温肺热病； Wind febrile disorders； Wind pestilence with lung heat
V009-N00042.pinyinNames: feng wen bing; fēng wēn bìng
V009-N00042.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00042.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden fever, mild aversion to wind cold, cough with yellow phlegm or haemoptysis, sore throat, followed by a persistent high-grade fever, sweating, excessive thirst, chest tightness and panting. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium and convulsions may be present. It is often seen in spring and winter. Contributing factors include pathogenic wind warmth attacking the Wei-defence, heat accumulating in the lung or heat transmitting to the pericardium.

V009-N00090.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00090.label: 伏暑病
V009-N00090.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00090.definition: 因暑湿或暑热之邪感而内伏,秋冬由时邪或疫毒引发,郁发于气分、营分，或郁发于少阳,或郁发于胃肠所致。临床以骤然发病,寒热如疟,或但热不寒,夜甚昼轻，得汗稍减，可伴见胸腹灼热，皮肤隐疹，大便溏而黄赤如酱，甚或烦躁、谵语，病势重而缠绵等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N00090.label: 伏暑
V009-N00090.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00090.definition: 暑热或暑湿病邪郁伏而于秋冬季节发病急骤的温病。

V009-N00090.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00090.label: 伏暑
V009-N00090.path: 中医病证｜伤寒与温病｜伤寒和温病｜温病
V009-N00090.definition: 属温病伏气温病之一。因长夏受暑湿之邪，留伏体内，至秋后发病者[43] 。

V009-N00090.label: 伏暑
V009-N00090.aliases: 冬月伏暑； 伏暑秋发； 伏暑晚发； 伏邪温疫； 晚发
V009-N00090.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V009-N00090.definition: 是由暑热病邪或暑湿病邪郁伏发于秋冬季节的急性热病。

V009-N00090.label: 伏暑病
V009-N00090.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00090.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00090.label: 伏暑
V009-N00090.englishNames: latent summerheat; Latent Summer Heat Diseases; Latent summer heat pestilence
V009-N00090.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00090.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden onset, alternating chills and fever or fever without chills that aggravates at night and alleviates during the day, especially after sweating. Associated symptoms may include a burning sensation in the chest and abdomen, skin rashes, and loose stools. In severe cases, restlessness or delirium may be present. Often occurs when seasonal pathogenic factors or epidemic toxin in autumn or winter triggers and causes the latent summer heat and dampness to retain in the qi/Ying nutrient phases, Shaoyang or stomach and intestines.

V009-N00090.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00090.label: 伏暑

V009-N01266.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.aliases: 小儿顿嗽； 百日咳； 天哮； 鹭鸶咳
V009-N01266.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01266.definition: 因风温疫毒犯肺，阻于气道,肺气上逆所致。临床以初起似感冒，随后出现阵发性痉咳，咳时面红、耳赤,咳后有特殊吸气性吼声或呕吐，咯出痰涎而暂停等为特征,多见于儿童的温疫病。

V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V009-N01266.definition: 以阵发性痉挛性咳嗽，咳后有特殊的吸气性吼声，咯出痰涎而暂停为特征的时行疾病。

V009-N01266.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01266.label: 百日咳
V009-N01266.definition: 为主要表现的疫病类疾病[3]。

V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.aliases: 顿呛； 顿嗽； 鸬鹚咳； 天哮呛； 疫咳
V009-N01266.englishNames: Paroxysmal Cough; Paroxysmal Coughing; Whooping Cough
V009-N01266.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V009-N01266.definition: 是小儿时期感受时行疠气疫邪引起的肺系时行疾病。以阵发性痉挛性咳嗽，咳后有特殊的吸气性吼声，咯出痰涎而暂停为特征。

V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.aliases: 小儿顿嗽； 百日咳； 天哮； 鹭鸶咳
V009-N01266.pinyinNames: dun ke; dong ke; du ke
V009-N01266.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01266.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.aliases: 百日咳； 小儿顿嗽； 天哮； 鹭鸶咳； Pertussis
V009-N01266.pinyinNames: dùn ké; dong ke; dun ke; du ke
V009-N01266.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01266.definition: A highly contagious disease affecting children. Initially, symptoms are typically similar to those of a common cold. This is then followed by a paroxysmal cough with a high-pitched whoop sound or gasp. Vomiting of saliva or phlegm may also occur. Often occurs when the bacterium Bordetella pertussis attacks the lung, obstructs the airway and causes lung qi to ascend.

V009-N01266.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01266.label: 顿咳

V009-N01266.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01266.label: 顿咳
V009-N01266.definition: an acute contagious infection of the respiratory system with characteristic paroxysmal cough, consisting of a deep inspiration, followed by a series of quick, short coughs which end with a long shrill and whooping inspiration, referring to pertussis

V009-N00059.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00059.definition: 泛指由感受温热邪毒而引起，初起以热象偏盛、易于人里化燥，甚或逆传心包、伤阴或动风、动血等为特征，多具有区域流行特点的一类温疫病。

V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00059.definition: 感受温邪引起的外感热病的统称。

V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00059.definition: 感受温热之邪引起的外感热病的统称。 xin gn wen bing

V009-N00059.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 中医病证｜伤寒与温病｜伤寒和温病
V009-N00059.definition: 属伤寒和温病；仅用于总论，宜用专指词；/诊断考虑卫气营血辨证感受温邪引起的外感热病的统称[21]。

V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证
V009-N00059.definition: 是由温邪引起的以发热为主症，具有热象偏重、易化燥伤阴等特点的一类急性外感热病。

V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.englishNames: warm disease; Seasonal Prevalent Diseases; Warmth disorders
V009-N00059.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.englishNames: warm disease; Seasonal Prevalent Diseases; Warmth disorders

V009-N00059.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V009-N00059.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00059.label: 温病
V009-N00059.englishNames: warm disease; Seasonal Prevalent Diseases; Warmth disorders; warmth disease; Warm diseases
V009-N00059.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00059.definition: A group of disorders caused by external contraction of pathogenic warm/heat. It is initially characterized by typical heat-induced symptoms or heat transforming into dryness after entering the interior. In severe cases, heat may transmit to the pericardium, damage yin or stir up internal wind. They are known as endemic warm diseases when spreading through population within a geographic area.

V009-N00059.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00059.label: 温病

V009-N00061.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00061.label: 伏气温病
V009-N00061.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病
V009-N00061.definition: 因感受病邪后伏藏于里，过时而发，或素有内热，复由新感病邪引动所致。临床以初起即见里热炽盛，可伴见化燥伤阴等气分或血分征象等为特征的温病。

V009-N00061.label: 伏邪温病
V009-N00061.englishNames: warm disease caused by incubating pathogens
V009-N00061.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00061.definition: 感受病邪后，伏藏于里,过时而发的温病。

V009-N00061.label: 伏邪温病
V009-N00061.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00061.definition: 感受病邪后，伏藏于里，过时而发的温病。

V009-N00061.label: 伏气温病
V009-N00061.englishNames: warm disease with latent pathogenic factors
V009-N00061.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病

V009-N00061.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00061.label: 伏气温病
V009-N00061.englishNames: Latent warm diseases; latent warm diseases; warm disease with latent pathogenic factors
V009-N00061.pinyinNames: fú qì wēn bìng; fu qi wen bing
V009-N00061.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00061.definition: A group of diseases initially characterized by exuberant interior heat and associated symptoms due to dry heat damaging yin. They are often caused by latent pathogenic factors in the interior or pre-existing heat coupled with contraction of new pathogenic factors.

V009-N00060.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00060.label: 新感温病
V009-N00060.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病
V009-N00060.definition: 因感受温邪，随感即发,或顺传胃肠，或邪陷心营，伤血动风等所致。临床以突然发热，微恶或不恶风寒,头痛,咽痛,旋即出现高热、汗出不减，口渴引饮,或伴见便秘,下利,神昏、谵语,斑疹、蛆血,抽搐等为特征的温病。

V009-N00060.label: 新感温病
V009-N00060.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病

V009-N00060.label: 新感温病
V009-N00060.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病

V009-N00060.label: 新感温病
V009-N00060.englishNames: newly contracted warm disease; new contraction of warm disease; newly acquired warm disease
V009-N00060.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜温病

V009-N00060.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00060.label: 新感温病
V009-N00060.englishNames: newly contracted warm disease; new contraction of warm disease; newly acquired warm disease; Acute warm diseases
V009-N00060.pinyinNames: xin gan wen bing; xīn gǎn wēn bìng
V009-N00060.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00060.definition: A group of diseases characterized by a sudden fever, mild or no aversion to wind cold, headache, and sore throat, followed by a high-grade fever, persistent sweating and thirst with a desire to drink water. Associated symptoms may include constipation, dysentery, unconsciousness, delirium, maculae, bleeding and convulsions. Contributing factors may include external contraction of pathogenic warmth, warmth transmitting to the stomach/intestine, warmth affecting the heart, warmth damaging blood, or warmth stirring up wind.

V009-N00060.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00060.label: 新感温病

V009-N01260.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01260.definition: 因感染麻疹疫毒，毒蕴肺胃，发于肌肤所致。临床以发热，咳嗽，流涕、流泪,眼结膜充血，口腔颊黏膜斑,遍身发疹，疹退脱屑,留有色素沉着，可伴见喉、肺、脑等变证为特征，多见于儿童的出疹性疫病。

V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V009-N01260.definition: 以初热期发热、咳嗽、流涕、眼结膜充血、畏光等，2\~3天后口腔颊黏膜粗糙，有细小白点(麻疹黏膜斑)为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N01260.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.definition: 为主要表现的疫病类疾病[3] 。

V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V009-N01260.definition: 为感受麻毒时邪引起的急性肺系时行病。以发热咳嗽，鼻塞流涕，泪水汪汪，全身发红疹及早期出现麻疹粘膜斑为特征。

V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01260.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N01260.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V009-N01260.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V009-N01260.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01260.definition: A condition characterized by fever, cough, runny nose, watery, inflamed eyes, presence of small white spots inside the mouth, and generalized maculopapular rash, followed by desquamation and pigmentation. In severe cases, complications involving the lung, throat, heart and liver may be present, which are often seen in infants. Often results from toxin (measles virus) affects the lung and spleen and spreads to the bloodstream and skin.

V009-N01260.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹

V009-N01260.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01260.label: 麻疹
V009-N01260.definition: an acute epidemic eruptive disease marked by fever and generalized maculopapular rash preceded by cough, nasal discharge, profuse tearing, and white speckles inside the mouth

V009-N01271.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01271.definition: 因感染燥热疫毒,邪犯肺胃,搏结于咽喉所致。临床以发热，咽痛，吞咽困难，咽、喉、鼻等处出现白色假膜，不易剥脱等为特征，多见于秋冬季而好发于儿童的疫病。

V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V009-N01271.definition: 以发热，咽痛，咽，喉，鼻等处出现白色假膜不易剥脱为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V009-N01271.definition: 以发热，咽喉痛，咽喉等处出现白色假膜不易剥脱为主要表现的急性传染性咽喉病。

V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V009-N01271.definition: 以咽喉间起白腐及疼痛、全身发热为其特征的急性、烈性传染病，称白喉。

V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01271.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V009-N01271.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N01271.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01271.definition: Characterized by fever, sore throat, red, swollen tonsils, the formation of white false membrane attached firmly to the pharynx, larynx and nose, difficulty swallowing, difficulty breathing, rapid breathing, restlessness, palpitations and shock. Often affects children in autumn and winter and occurs when bacterium Corynebacterium diphtheria affects the throat and consumes yin fluids.

V009-N01271.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01271.label: 白喉
V009-N01271.definition: an acute infectious disease characterized by fever, sore throat and the formation of white false membrane attached firmly to the pharynx, larynx and nose

V009-N01272.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01272.label: 天花
V009-N01272.aliases: 痘疹； 痘疮； 天行时痘
V009-N01272.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01272.definition: 因感染天花疫毒所致。临床以寒战、高热,皮肤成批依次出现斑疹、丘疹、疱疹、脓疱，最后结痂、脱痂,遗留痘疤，历经发热、见点、起胀、灌浆、收匾和结痂六个阶段为特征，多见于小儿的出疹性疫病。

V009-N01272.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01272.label: 天花
V009-N01272.aliases: 天行痘； 痘疮； 天痘
V009-N01272.definition: 属瘟疫是一种传染性极强、病情险恶的病毒性传染病。又名痘疮、天痘、天行痘等[43]。

V009-N01272.label: 天花
V009-N01272.aliases: 痘疹； 痘疮； 天行时痘； 天痘； 天行痘
V009-N01272.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01272.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01272.label: 天花
V009-N01272.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N01272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01272.label: 天花
V009-N01272.aliases: 痘疹； 痘疮； 天行时痘； 天痘； 天行痘
V009-N01272.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01272.definition: An infectious disease caused by the variola virus and often affects children. It is characterized by chills, fever and skin rashes, papules, sores, pustules and scabs. The latter may fall off, leaving marks on the skin. This condition usually passes through six stages: fever, early rashes, raised bumps, pustular rashes, scabs and falling off of the scabs.

V009-N01272.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01272.label: 痘疮

V009-N01272.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01272.label: 痘疮
V009-N01272.definition: an acute highly contagious febrile disease characterized by skin eruptions with pustules, sloughing, and scar formation, the same as variola

V009-N00097.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00097.label: 瘟毒病
V009-N00097.aliases: 瘟疫发斑； 时疫发斑； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑
V009-N00097.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00097.definition: 因感受温热疫毒，或虱蚤叮咬，疫毒随而侵入血脉，热毒伤营，或闭扰神明所致。临床以高热，头痛，谵语狂扰，甚则神识昏蒙，伴见斑疹密布，疹色紫暗或黑陷，或疮疡疗疗走黄等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N00097.label: 温毒发疵
V009-N00097.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00097.definition: 又称“温疫发斑”。感受温热毒邪，以皮肤发斑，形大如豆，色紫黑，胸背腰腹尤稠，壮热烦躁，头面红肿，目赤唇焦，大渴引饮，咽喉肿痛，甚则起腐，口秽喷人，或吐血血，便秘溲赤，神昏谵语，舌紫，苔黄，甚则焦紫起瓣，脉浮沉俱盛等为常见症的温毒证候。

V009-N00097.label: 温毒发斑
V009-N00097.englishNames: Epidemic Diseases with Eruptions; Heat Toxin with Skin Eruption
V009-N00097.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜传染病
V009-N00097.definition: 疫毒之邪随虱蚤叮咬侵入血脉，热毒伤营，闭扰神明。以高热，斑疹，头痛，神识昏蒙为主要表现的疫病类疾病。

V009-N00097.label: 瘟毒病
V009-N00097.aliases: 瘟疫发斑； 时疫发斑； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑
V009-N00097.pinyinNames: wen dong bing; wen er bing
V009-N00097.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00097.label: 瘟毒
V009-N00097.aliases: 温毒； 温毒发斑； 瘟毒发斑； Pestilence eruptions
V009-N00097.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00097.definition: Characterized by high fever, headache, and presence of maculae or sores/ulcers. In severe cases, clouding of consciousness may be present. This condition often occurs when pestilence toxin enters the bloodstream with lice/fleas to damage the Ying nutrients or disturb the heart mind.

V009-N00098.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00098.definition: 因风热时毒侵袭三阳经络,或丹毒上攻颜面、咽喉所致。临床以发热、恶寒,颜面耳项锨赤肿胀，咽赤肿痛等为特征，多发于冬春季的温疫病。

V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00098.definition: 感受风热时毒，以头面掀赤肿痛为主要表现的急性外感热病。

V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00098.definition: 感受风热时毒，以头面掀赤肿痛为主要表现的急性外感热病。

V009-N00098.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.definition: 为主要表现的急性外感热病[21]。

V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.aliases: 大头风； 大头伤寒； 大头天行； 大头温； 虾蟆温
V009-N00098.englishNames: Epidemic disease Characterized by Swelling and Redness of the Face
V009-N00098.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜外感病证｜温病
V009-N00098.definition: 是感受风热时毒所致以头面焮赤肿痛为特征的急性外感热病。

V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.englishNames: swollen-head epidemic; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head; erysipelas facialis; swollen head due to infection
V009-N00098.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00098.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.englishNames: swollen-head epidemic; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head; erysipelas facialis; swollen head due to infection; pestilence with swollen face; Swollen face
V009-N00098.pinyinNames: da tou wen; dà tóu wēn
V009-N00098.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00098.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, and local (face, ear, neck and throat) redness, swelling, hotness and pain. It is more common in winter or spring. This condition often occurs when seasonal wind heat toxin attacks the three yang meridians in the face. It is known as erysipelas facialis in modern medicine.

V009-N00098.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00098.label: 大头瘟
V009-N00098.englishNames: erysipelas facialis; swollen-head infection; fever with swollen head

V009-N01263.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01263.definition: 因外感时邪风毒，内蕴湿热，发于肤表所致。临床以发热，咳嗽，皮肤分批出现皮疹,斑丘疹、疱疹及结痂同时并见等为特征,多见于小儿的出疹性温疫病。

V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V009-N01263.definition: 感染水痘病毒引起的疾病。

V009-N01263.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.definition: 为主要表现的急性疱疹性疾病[3]。

V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.aliases: 水疮； 水花； 水疱
V009-N01263.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V009-N01263.definition: 是由外感时行邪毒引起的急性发疹性时行疾病。以发热，皮肤粘膜上分批出现丘疹、疱疹、结痂为特征。

V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮； varicella
V009-N01263.pinyinNames: shui dong; shui dou; shui er
V009-N01263.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01263.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N01263.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V009-N01263.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮； varicella； 小儿水痘
V009-N01263.pinyinNames: shui dong; shui dou; shui er; shuǐ dòu
V009-N01263.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N01263.definition: Characterized by fever, cough and skin rashes that turn into fluid-filled blisters, which then crust over to form scabs. This condition often occurs when epidemic wind and internal damp heat affect the surface of the body.

V009-N01263.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.aliases: BES000； 水疱； 水花； 水疮

V009-N01263.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V009-N01263.label: 水痘
V009-N01263.aliases: 水疱； 水花； 水疮
V009-N01263.definition: an acute contagious disease caused by seasonal toxin and manifested by fever and bursts of macular and papular eruptions followed by incrustation but no scar formation, the same as varicella

V009-N01267.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01267.label: 暑温病
V009-N01267.aliases: 暑温； 小儿暑温； 暑瘟病； 暑瘟； 小儿暑瘟病
V009-N01267.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01267.definition: 因暑热疫毒随蚊子叮咬而进入人体，上犯清空，内陷心肝所致。临床以骤然高热，头痛、项强，呕吐，可迅速出现神昏、谵语，痉厥，角弓反张等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N01267.label: 小儿暑温
V009-N01267.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病

V009-N01267.label: 小儿暑温
V009-N01267.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V009-N01267.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V009-N01267.definition: 是感受暑温邪毒引起的时行疾病，以高热，抽搐，昏迷为主症。发病突然，变化迅速，病程中可发生内闭外脱，呼吸不整而猝然变险。

V009-N01267.label: 暑温病
V009-N01267.aliases: 暑温； 小儿暑温； 暑瘟病； 暑瘟； 小儿暑瘟病
V009-N01267.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N01267.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N01267.label: 小儿暑温
V009-N01267.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N01267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N01267.label: 小儿暑温
V009-N01267.aliases: 暑风； 暑痉； 暑厥
V009-N01267.englishNames: Summer Febrile Prevaldis; infectious summer fever in children(epidemic encephalitis B in children; infantile warm disease in summer

V009-N00099.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00099.label: 烂喉丹痧
V009-N00099.aliases: 丹痧； 喉痧； 烂喉痧； 疫喉痧； 小儿烂喉丹痧； 猩红热
V009-N00099.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00099.definition: 因感受丹痧疫毒，上冲咽喉，外窜肌肤所致。临床以发热,咽喉肿痛糜烂，皮肤出现弥漫性猩红色皮疹、杨梅舌,皮疹消退后脱落糠片样皮屑，甚则伴见高热、神昏、休克等为特征，多见于小儿的出疹性疫病。

V009-N00099.label: 烂喉丹痧
V009-N00099.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00099.definition: 感受时疫引起的，以咽喉肿痛糜烂，肌肤丹痧密布为主要表现的急性外感热病。

V009-N00099.label: 烂喉丹痧
V009-N00099.aliases: 丹痧； 喉痧； 烂喉痧； 小儿烂喉丹痧； 疫喉痧； 猩红热； Scarlet fever
V009-N00099.englishNames: scarlet fever involving the throat; scarlet fever; scarlatina; Ulcerated throat with red exanthem
V009-N00099.pinyinNames: lan hou dan sha; làn hóu dān shā
V009-N00099.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00099.definition: Characterized by fever, sore, ulcerative and swollen throat, characteristic diffuse red skin rashes, a “strawberry” tongue with a spreading pattern and desquamating process. In severe cases, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and shock may be present. Often affects children and occurs when epidemic warm heat affects the throat and skin through the mouth, nose or skin lesion.

V009-N00099.definition: an acute seasonal infectious disease marked by swelling and erosion of the throat, erythematous rash and raspberry tongue

V009-N01264.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N01264.label: 烂喉丹痧
V009-N01264.aliases: 丹痧； 喉痧； 烂喉痧； 疫喉痧； 小儿烂喉丹痧； 猩红热
V009-N01264.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N01264.definition: 因感受丹痧疫毒，上冲咽喉，外窜肌肤所致。临床以发热,咽喉肿痛糜烂，皮肤出现弥漫性猩红色皮疹、杨梅舌,皮疹消退后脱落糠片样皮屑，甚则伴见高热、神昏、休克等为特征，多见于小儿的出疹性疫病。

V009-N01264.label: 烂喉丹痧
V009-N01264.aliases: 丹痧； 喉痧； 烂喉痧； 小儿烂喉丹痧； 疫喉痧； 猩红热

V009-N00141.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V009-N00141.definition: 因疟蚊叮咬，感染疟邪，或瘴毒、疫毒入血，与卫气交争，伏藏于半表半里，甚或邪犯清空,蒙蔽心神所致。临床以往来寒热,休作有时，头痛,汗出而解，反复发作,甚或伴见神昏、谵语,胁下有痞块等为特征的温疫病。

V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00141.definition: 感染疟原虫引起的,以往来寒热，休作有时，反复发作，日久胁下有痞块为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00141.definition: 感染疟原虫、瘴毒或风寒暑湿之气，以往来寒热，休作有时，反复发作，日久胁下有痞块为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00141.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.definition: 为病。以往来寒热、休作有时、头痛、汗出而解、日久左胁下有痞块等为主要表现的疫病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V009-N00141.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00141.definition: 为感受疟邪，邪正交争所致，是以寒战壮热，头痛，汗出，休作有时为特征的传染性疾病，多发于夏秋季。

V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.englishNames: malaria; Malaria; Alternating fever and chills disorder
V009-N00141.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.englishNames: malaria; Malaria; Alternating fever and chills disorder

V009-N00141.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V009-N00141.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00141.label: 疟疾
V009-N00141.aliases: Alternating fever and chills disorder； 瘴疟
V009-N00141.englishNames: malaria; Malaria; Alternating fever and chills disorder
V009-N00141.pinyinNames: nue ji; nüè jí; nve ji
V009-N00141.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00141.definition: Characterized by paroxysms of sudden coldness followed by shivering and then fever and sweating. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, and masses in the left subcostal region may be present. Often occurs when toxin of malarial parasites enters the bloodstream and struggles with the Wei-defensive qi between the exterior and interior. It may also occur when toxin of malaria parasites disturbs the heart mind.

V009-N00141.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00141.label: 疟疾

V009-N00156.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00156.label: 瘴疟
V009-N00156.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00156.definition: 因南方气候湿热，疟蚊叮咬，疟邪侵袭气血，上犯清空，蒙蔽心神，或邪热内盛，胆汁外溢所致。临床以疟发无固定时日，或伴见神昏、谵语，黄疸，重度贫血等为特征的疟疾重症。

V009-N00156.label: 瘴疟
V009-N00156.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00156.definition: 感受山岚瘴毒引起的疟疾。

V009-N00156.label: 温疟
V009-N00156.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00156.definition: 又称“瘴疟”，“牡疟”。以但热甚而寒微，或但热而无寒，少气烦闷，手足热而欲呕，头痛，骨节烦痛，口渴引饮，舌红，苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的疟疾。

V009-N00156.label: 瘴疟
V009-N00156.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00156.definition: 感受山岚瘴毒引起的疟疾。

V009-N00156.definition: 为病。以往来寒热、休作有时、头痛、汗出而解、日久左胁下有痞块等为主要表现的疫病类疾病[3]。

V009-N00156.label: 疟疾
V009-N00156.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V009-N00156.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证

V009-N00156.definition: Characterized by paroxysms of sudden coldness followed by shivering and then fever and sweating. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, and masses in the left subcostal region may be present. Often occurs when toxin of malarial parasites enters the bloodstream and struggles with the Wei-defensive qi between the exterior and interior. It may also occur when toxin of malaria parasites disturbs the heart mind.

V009-N00156.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00156.label: 瘴疟
V009-N00156.englishNames: Miasmic malaria; miasmic malaria; miasmatic malaria; malignant malaria
V009-N00156.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00156.definition: Characterized by sudden episodes occurring at irregular periods, unconsciousness, delirium, jaundice and severe anaemia. Often occurs when mosquito bites in damp heat environment enter the bloodstream to disturb the heart mind or causes the bile to overflow.

V009-N00142.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00142.label: 疟母
V009-N00142.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00142.definition: 因疟疾反复不愈，邪与气血相搏,痰瘀结于胁下所致。临床以胁下痞块，胀痛不舒，面色晦暗，舌有瘀象等为特征的疟疾。

V009-N00142.label: 疟母
V009-N00142.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00142.definition: 以疟疾反复发作，终年不愈，胁下结成痞块，胀痛不舒，面色晦暗，舌见瘀斑，脉弦涩等为常见症的疟疾。

V009-N00142.label: 疟母
V009-N00142.englishNames: malaria with splenomegaly; malaria with abdominal mass
V009-N00142.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V009-N00142.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V009-N00142.label: 疟母
V009-N00142.path: 经方病机（金匮要略）代码表｜疟病病机

V009-N00142.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00142.label: 疟母
V009-N00142.englishNames: malaria with splenomegaly; malaria with hypochondriac mass; malaria with abdominal mass; Mother-of-malaria
V009-N00142.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00142.definition: Characterized by distending and painful lumps in the subcostal region, a dark grey complexion and a tongue with stasis. Often occurs when combined phlegm and stasis remain in the subcostal region in chronic malaria.

V009-N00142.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00142.label: 疟母

V009-N00132.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00132.label: 寒湿痢
V009-N00132.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痢疾
V009-N00132.definition: 因直接感染寒湿疫毒，或接触疫痢病人，素体阳虚,邪从寒化所致。临床以腹痛拘急，或皖腹阵痛，泻后稍缓，泻下黏冻，白多赤少，或纯下白冻，里急后重，头身困重等为特征的痢疾。

V009-N00132.label: 寒湿痢
V009-N00132.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00132.definition: 感受寒湿，以腹痛拘急，里急后重，痢下赤白黏冻，白多赤少，或纯为白冻，口淡乏味，中皖痞闷不渴，头重身困，小便清白，舌淡，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的痢疾。

V009-N00132.label: 痢疾
V009-N00132.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V009-N00132.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00132.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V009-N00132.label: 寒湿困脾证痢疾
V009-N00132.aliases: 寒湿痢； 痢疾寒湿困脾证
V009-N00132.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V009-N00132.label: 寒湿痢
V009-N00132.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V009-N00132.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00132.label: 寒湿痢
V009-N00132.englishNames: Cold dampness dysentery; cold-dampness dysentery; cold-damp dysentery
V009-N00132.pinyinNames: han shi li; hán shī lì
V009-N00132.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00132.definition: Characterized by abdominal pain/spasm, paroxysmal abdominal pain that alleviates after bowel movements, tenesmus, body heaviness, and chronic diarrhoea with stools containing more mucus than blood or mucus alone. Often results from direct contraction of epidemic cold dampness toxin, contact with dysentery patients or pathogenic factors transforming into cold due to constitutional yang deficiency.

V009-N00132.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00132.label: 寒湿痢

V009-N00137.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00137.label: 噤口痢
V009-N00137.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痢疾
V009-N00137.definition: 因湿热疫毒蕴结肠中,邪毒犯胃,损伤气阴所致。临床以呕恶、不食，下痢频繁，肌肉瘦削等为特征的痢疾重症。

V009-N00137.label: 噤口痢
V009-N00137.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00137.definition: 以下痢不能进食，或下痢呕恶不能食等为常见症的痢疾。

V009-N00137.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00137.label: 噤口痢
痢疾
V009-N00137.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V009-N00137.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00137.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V009-N00137.englishNames: food-denying dysentery; Fasting Dysentery; anorectic dysentery
V009-N00137.pinyinNames: jin  kou li; jin kou li
V009-N00137.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V009-N00137.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00137.label: 噤口痢
V009-N00137.englishNames: anorectic dysentery; food-denying dysentery; Fasting Dysentery; Food-denying dysentery
V009-N00137.pinyinNames: jin  kou li; 噤kou li; jin kou li; jìn kǒu lì
V009-N00137.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00137.definition: Characterized by nausea, vomiting, loss of appetite, frequent, severe dysentery and muscle wasting. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat toxin accumulates in the intestine to affect the stomach and damage qi and yin.

V009-N00137.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00137.label: 噤口痢

V009-N00130.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00130.label: 湿热痢
V009-N00130.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痢疾
V009-N00130.definition: 因饮食不洁，湿热疫毒经口而入，或接触疫痢病人，疫毒积滞肠间，阻遏气机，损伤肠络所致。临床以骤然发热,腹痛、皖闷，大便脓血,赤多白少,里急后重,肛门灼热,小便短少等为特征的痢疾。

V009-N00130.label: 湿热痢
V009-N00130.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00130.definition: 湿热积滞，以腹痛，里急后重，下利赤白脓血，赤多白少，或纯下赤冻，肛门灼热，胸皖痞闷，小便短少，舌红，苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的痢疾。

V009-N00130.label: 痢疾
V009-N00130.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V009-N00130.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00130.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V009-N00130.label: 湿热证痢疾
V009-N00130.aliases: 痢疾湿热蕴结证； 痢疾湿热证； 湿热痢； 湿热蕴结证痢疾
V009-N00130.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V009-N00130.label: 湿热痢
V009-N00130.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V009-N00130.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00130.label: 湿热痢
V009-N00130.englishNames: damp-heat dysentery; dampness-heat dysentery; Damp heat dysentery
V009-N00130.pinyinNames: shi re li; shī rè lì
V009-N00130.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00130.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, abdominal pain, tenesmus and diarrhoea with stool containing mucus and blood. Often results from ingestion of contaminated food/water or contact with dysentery patients.

V009-N00130.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00130.label: 湿热痢

V009-N00138.label: 湿热痢

V009-N00140.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00140.label: 休息痢
V009-N00140.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痢疾
V009-N00140.definition: 因痢疾久病不愈，脾胃虚损，邪毒留恋不去所致。临床以下痢时作时止，大便夹带赤白黏冻，腹痛隐隐，发作时伴见里急后重，休止时常见腹胀，食少，倦怠等为特征的慢性痢疾。

V009-N00140.label: 痢疾
V009-N00140.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V009-N00140.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00140.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V009-N00140.label: 正虚邪恋证痢疾
V009-N00140.aliases: 痢疾正虚邪恋证； 休息痢
V009-N00140.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V009-N00140.label: 休息痢
V009-N00140.englishNames: intermittent dysentery; Chronic Intermittent Dysentery; recurrent dysentery
V009-N00140.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V009-N00140.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00140.label: 休息痢
V009-N00140.englishNames: intermittent dysentery; Intermittent dysentery; Chronic Intermittent Dysentery; recurrent dysentery
V009-N00140.pinyinNames: xiu xi li; xiū xi lì
V009-N00140.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00140.definition: Characterized by intermittent diarrhoea containing mucus or blood and dull abdominal pain. Patients present with tenesmus during acute episodes. Abdominal distension, a low food intake and lassitude are present during intermittence. Often occurs when chronic dysentery damages the spleen and stomach, coupled with retention of pathogenic toxin.

V009-N00140.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00140.label: 休息痢

V009-N00032.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痢疾
V009-N00032.definition: 因感染痢疾疫毒，损伤肠络，或内陷心包，引动肝风所致。临床以大便脓血，里急后重，高热、腹痛，甚则神昏、抽搐，肢厥、面青等为特征的痢疾重症。

V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜急症
V009-N00032.definition: 以发病急骤，高热，烦躁口渴，腹痛剧烈，大便脓血，甚或神昏抽搐，肢冷为主要表现的危重痢疾。

V009-N00032.label: 痢疾
V009-N00032.aliases: 肠澼； 赤痢； 寒湿痢； 噤口痢； 湿热痢； 休息痢； 疫毒痢； 滞下
V009-N00032.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V009-N00032.definition: 是因外感时邪疫毒，内伤饮食而致邪蕴肠腑，气血壅滞，传导失司，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，排赤白脓血便为主要临床表现的具有传染性的外感疾病。

V009-N00032.label: 疫毒侵袭证痢疾
V009-N00032.aliases: 痢疾疫毒侵袭证； 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜痢疾

V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.englishNames: fulminant dysentery; pestilent dysentery; epidemic toxin dysentery
V009-N00032.pinyinNames: yi er li; yi dong li
V009-N00032.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾｜疟母

V009-N00032.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V009-N00032.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢
V009-N00032.englishNames: fulminant dysentery; pestilent dysentery; epidemic toxin dysentery; Epidemic toxin dysentery
V009-N00032.pinyinNames: yi er li; yi dong li; yì dú lì
V009-N00032.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00032.definition: Characterized by frequent stools containing blood and mucus, tenesmus, a high-grade fever, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, loss of consciousness with convulsions, cold limbs and cyanosis may be present. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat toxin (dysentery bacillus) damages the intestine, enters the pericardium or stirs liver wind.

V009-N00032.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00032.label: 疫毒痢

V009-N00155.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00155.definition: 因腑脏空虚，营卫伤损，疟邪伏藏所致。临床以疟疾时作时休,经久不愈，或稍劳即发等为特征的慢性疟疾。

V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V009-N00155.definition: 发作日久不愈的疟疾。感染痢疾杆菌引起的，以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，大便下脓血为主要表现的疾病。

V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病

V009-N00155.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表（2008）
V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.definition: 属疟疾发作日久不愈之疟疾[3]。

V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V009-N00155.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00155.label: 久疟
V009-N00155.englishNames: chronic malaria; Chronic malaria; Chronic Malaria
V009-N00155.pinyinNames: jiu nue; jiǔ nüè; jiu nve
V009-N00155.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00155.definition: Characterized by intermittent and prolonged episodes. Often results from deficiency of zang–fu organs, damage to Ying nutrients and Wei-defence and retention of Plasmodium parasites.

V009-N00151.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00151.label: 久疟
V009-N00151.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00151.definition: 因腑脏空虚，营卫伤损，疟邪伏藏所致。临床以疟疾时作时休,经久不愈，或稍劳即发等为特征的慢性疟疾。

V009-N00151.label: 劳疟
V009-N00151.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00151.definition: 以疟疾日久不愈，稍劳即发，或搓后复发，寒热时作，面色胱白，倦怠嗜卧，头目眩晕，或胁下结成痞块，触之可得，舌淡胖，脉细弱等为常见症的疟疾。

V009-N00151.label: 疟疾
V009-N00151.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V009-N00151.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00151.definition: 为感受疟邪，邪正交争所致，是以寒战壮热，头痛，汗出，休作有时为特征的传染性疾病，多发于夏秋季。

V009-N00151.label: 正虚邪恋证疟疾
V009-N00151.aliases: 劳疟； 疟疾正虚邪恋证
V009-N00151.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜疟疾

V009-N00151.label: 久疟
V009-N00151.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V009-N00151.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00151.label: 久疟
V009-N00151.englishNames: chronic malaria; Chronic malaria; Chronic Malaria
V009-N00151.pinyinNames: jiu nue; jiǔ nüè; jiu nve
V009-N00151.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00151.definition: Characterized by intermittent and prolonged episodes. Often results from deficiency of zang–fu organs, damage to Ying nutrients and Wei-defence and retention of Plasmodium parasites.

V009-N00151.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00151.label: 劳疟
V009-N00151.englishNames: consumptive malaria; chronic malaria $ malaria with splenomegaly

V009-N00143.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00143.label: 正疟
V009-N00143.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00143.definition: 因感染疟邪,正邪交争于表里之间所致。临床以先寒战,后发热,终则汗出热退,间日或三日一发为特征的疟疾。

V009-N00143.label: 正疟
V009-N00143.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00143.definition: 疟邪伏于少阳半表半里，出人营卫，具有寒热往来，界限清楚，并作止有时特点，以初起肢体酸楚，呵欠乏力，继则畏寒战栗，寒罢则遍体灼热，头痛面赤，口渴心烦，数小时后，汗出淋漓，发热骤退，诸症消失，或稍觉头昏神疲，舌红，苔薄白或薄黄，脉弦等为常见症的疟疾。

V009-N00143.label: 少阳病证疟疾
V009-N00143.aliases: 疟疾少阳病证； 疟疾邪郁少阳证； 邪郁少阳证疟疾； 正疟
V009-N00143.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证｜疟疾

V009-N00143.label: 正疟
V009-N00143.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V009-N00143.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V009-N00143.label: 正疟
V009-N00143.aliases: 间日疟； 三日疟； Quartan malaria
V009-N00143.englishNames: regular malaria; normal malaria; Regular malaria
V009-N00143.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00143.definition: Characterized by shivering and then fever and sweating, occurring every other day or three days. Patients with warm malaria present with more fever than shivering, whereas patients with cold malaria present with more shivering than fever. Often occurs when anti-pathogenic qi struggles with pathogenic factors in between the exterior and interior.

V009-N00143.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V009-N00143.label: 正疟

V009-N00152.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V009-N00152.label: 正疟
V009-N00152.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V009-N00152.definition: 因感染疟邪,正邪交争于表里之间所致。临床以先寒战,后发热,终则汗出热退,间日或三日一发为特征的疟疾。

V009-N00152.label: 间日疟
V009-N00152.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V009-N00152.definition: 疟邪侵于少阳之经，以间日发作，止作有时，先伸欠，继而寒战，腰脊俱痛，寒去则内外皆热，头痛面赤，渴欲饮冷，苔白滑，脉弦数，终则汗出，热退身凉似无病等为常见症的疟疾。疟邪深入，元气大虚，以寒热三日一发，缠绵不愈，倦怠食减，面色胱白，脉虚弱，舌淡苔薄白等为常见症的疟疾。

V009-N00152.label: 疟疾
V009-N00152.aliases: 寒疟； 间日疟； 劳疟； 热瘴； 湿疟； 疫疟； 瘴疟
V009-N00152.path: 病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V009-N00152.definition: 为感受疟邪，邪正交争所致，是以寒战壮热，头痛，汗出，休作有时为特征的传染性疾病，多发于夏秋季。

V009-N00152.label: 正疟
V009-N00152.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V009-N00152.label: 正疟
V009-N00152.aliases: 间日疟； 三日疟； Quartan malaria
V009-N00152.englishNames: regular malaria; normal malaria; Regular malaria
V009-N00152.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V009-N00152.definition: Characterized by shivering and then fever and sweating, occurring every other day or three days. Patients with warm malaria present with more fever than shivering, whereas patients with cold malaria present with more shivering than fever. Often occurs when anti-pathogenic qi struggles with pathogenic factors in between the exterior and interior.
